name: SAVE THE EPA (314 Action)
subject: Can you add your ✍️?

body:
| Team, we've had enough of President Trump's daily coronavirus briefings. It's time the press stops airing these propaganda shows live.

[If you agree, sign on and demand networks stop airing Trump's coronavirus briefings live->](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb4c20/4bd7760e/5ae27951/77af4d77/1703245754/VEsH/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://actionnetwork.org/forms/sign-the-petition-demand-networks-stop-airing-trumps-coronavirus-briefings-live-trumps-continuous-lies-spread-dangerous-misinformation?source=direct_link&referrer=group-314-action&redirect=%0Ahttps%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2F314-trumpbriefingja%3Frefcode%3D314_EM_JA_200419_1MO_1MC_none_STD_2_Trumpbreifing%26amount%3D25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=1+-+If+you+agree+sign+on+and+demand+networks&utm_campaign=314_EM_JA_200419_1MO_1MC_none_STD_2_Trumpbreifing&refcode=314_EM_JA_200419_1MO_1MC_none_STD_2_Trumpbreifing")

| [Sign On](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb4c20/4bd7760e/5ae27951/77af4d76/1703245754/VEsE/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://actionnetwork.org/forms/sign-the-petition-demand-networks-stop-airing-trumps-coronavirus-briefings-live-trumps-continuous-lies-spread-dangerous-misinformation?source=direct_link&referrer=group-314-action&redirect=%0Ahttps%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2F314-trumpbriefingja%3Frefcode%3D314_EM_JA_200419_1MO_1MC_none_STD_2_Trumpbreifing%26amount%3D25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=2+-+Sign+On&utm_campaign=314_EM_JA_200419_1MO_1MC_none_STD_2_Trumpbreifing&refcode=314_EM_JA_200419_1MO_1MC_none_STD_2_Trumpbreifing")
---

* * *

**\------Begin Forwarded Message------**

Hey, remember when we had a competent, decent president?

Now, amid the coronavirus pandemic, we are saddled with a childish imbecile who uses his daily press briefings to trumpet false claims, spread misinformation, and promote propaganda.

**We 've had enough of these briefings, but the national press continues to air Trump's dangerous daily briefings.**

[Demand that networks stop airing Trump's coronavirus briefings live by adding your name here->](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb4c20/4bd7760e/5ae27951/77af4d75/1703245754/VEsF/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://actionnetwork.org/forms/sign-the-petition-demand-networks-stop-airing-trumps-coronavirus-briefings-live-trumps-continuous-lies-spread-dangerous-misinformation?source=direct_link&referrer=group-314-action&redirect=%0Ahttps%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2F314-trumpbriefingja%3Frefcode%3D314_EM_JA_200419_1MO_1MC_none_STD_2_Trumpbreifing%26amount%3D25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=3+-+Demand+that+networks+stop+airing+Trumprs&utm_campaign=314_EM_JA_200419_1MO_1MC_none_STD_2_Trumpbreifing&refcode=314_EM_JA_200419_1MO_1MC_none_STD_2_Trumpbreifing")

[Sign On](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb4c20/4bd7760e/5ae27951/77af4d74/1703245754/VEsC/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://actionnetwork.org/forms/sign-the-petition-demand-networks-stop-airing-trumps-coronavirus-briefings-live-trumps-continuous-lies-spread-dangerous-misinformation?source=direct_link&referrer=group-314-action&redirect=%0Ahttps%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2F314-trumpbriefingja%3Frefcode%3D314_EM_JA_200419_1MO_1MC_none_STD_2_Trumpbreifing%26amount%3D25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=4+-+Sign+On&utm_campaign=314_EM_JA_200419_1MO_1MC_none_STD_2_Trumpbreifing&refcode=314_EM_JA_200419_1MO_1MC_none_STD_2_Trumpbreifing")
---

* * *

Let's recap all of the nonsense Trump has claimed during these press briefings.

* That chloroquine was approved to treat COVID-19 -- FALSE
* Blamed hospitals for shortages in medical supplies -- FALSE
* Said there were no warnings or preparation heeds -- VERIFIABLY FALSE
* Contradicted leading health experts -- JUST DANGEROUS

**It comes down to this: the national press is doing a huge disservice to the American people by broadcasting these briefings live.**

They run the risk of being complicit in Trump's misinformation campaign if they continue to run these briefings.

[It's time to pull the plug on these briefings. Demand networks stop airing Trump's coronavirus briefings live->](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb4c20/4bd7760e/5ae27951/77af4d73/1703245754/VEsD/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://actionnetwork.org/forms/sign-the-petition-demand-networks-stop-airing-trumps-coronavirus-briefings-live-trumps-continuous-lies-spread-dangerous-misinformation?source=direct_link&referrer=group-314-action&redirect=%0Ahttps%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2F314-trumpbriefingja%3Frefcode%3D314_EM_JA_200419_1MO_1MC_none_STD_2_Trumpbreifing%26amount%3D25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=5+-+Itrsquos+time+to+pull+the+plug+on+these+&utm_campaign=314_EM_JA_200419_1MO_1MC_none_STD_2_Trumpbreifing&refcode=314_EM_JA_200419_1MO_1MC_none_STD_2_Trumpbreifing")

[STOP MISINFORMATION](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb4c20/4bd7760e/5ae27951/77af4d72/1703245754/VEsA/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://actionnetwork.org/forms/sign-the-petition-demand-networks-stop-airing-trumps-coronavirus-briefings-live-trumps-continuous-lies-spread-dangerous-misinformation?source=direct_link&referrer=group-314-action&redirect=%0Ahttps%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2F314-trumpbriefingja%3Frefcode%3D314_EM_JA_200419_1MO_1MC_none_STD_2_Trumpbreifing%26amount%3D25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=6+-+STOP+MISINFORMATION&utm_campaign=314_EM_JA_200419_1MO_1MC_none_STD_2_Trumpbreifing&refcode=314_EM_JA_200419_1MO_1MC_none_STD_2_Trumpbreifing")
---

Thank you,

314 Action

Paid for by 314 Action Fund, 314action.org, not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee.

314 Action is a grassroots community of over 1.81 million people working to elect Democratic scientists who will use science and facts to address some of our most pressing issues like climate change and health care. In 2018 we played a pivotal role in flipping the US House of Representatives by electing 9 Democratic scientists to the House and Senate as well as over 100 to key legislative districts while raising over $5.2 million with an average donation of just $27.55. Now we're focused on flipping the US Senate, defeating 25 climate deniers in Congress and flipping key state legislatures across the country.

If you'd like to support 314 Action, you can **[click here](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb4c20/4bd7760e/5ae27951/77af4d70/1703245754/VEsO/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/314-emfooter?refcode=emfooter&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=8+-+click+here&utm_campaign=314_EM_JA_200419_1MO_1MC_none_STD_2_Trumpbreifing&source=314_EM_JA_200419_1MO_1MC_none_STD_2_Trumpbreifing")** to make a donation.

Quick update from campaign HQ, where we're working on new videos, making calls to voters, and training volunteers every day. Our lawn signs are arriving from a Portland printer tomorrow, and our texting team has just crushed their goal of 10,000 texts before Wednesday. With the power of texting, we're making connections with voters across the district despite social distancing. The feedback is positive we're getting a lot of commitments to Vote Canning in the upcoming primary! But all this texting costs money! ($.07 per text to be exact.) That means that before this month is out, our campaign will spend thousands. We are falling short on our fundraising goal for April and need to raise**$10,296 before April 31st.** We need your support tonight to get back on track. If everyone reading this gave $25, we'd hit our goal easily. [Please donate $25, $50, or more if you can. ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/-QA/ni0YAA/t.315/fg901lA7Ts2oHtoks5pVuA/h1/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNKPj9S5dRtR9nVdq7nW05v05-2Fi7D9J-2Fqhj-2F46hEBctJ7P-2FqeWsVA6iVYTz9NXF04yBMZQPVgEN-2Fkj3wTlX4eMmou7Ay8BJNVw7-2BMaYkAYqmnR-2BVRgIb8VX0aAxoC6t6wEDALChU01NOsjQUvD9BD3CosU6UDpe9oGoDU-2FlAC0y-2FzEMzdZf7j2wC1yrSLS1-2F5-2Bm8r8gC49Zg3AQYJj7t2FYf4Y5EmvV5S-2BeGtq5fsPxVL2LlqqkXs4sFrXeULOVaY2I-3D/1N7C)

name: Team Hagerty
subject: #TeamHagerty Stands Against Communist China
body:
#TeamHagerty Updates Straight To Your Inbox
No images? [Click here](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-e-nuklhkl-fuutjhhtj-jy/)
# April 21, 2020
**WATCH: Hagerty with Shannon Bream** [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-nuklhkl-fuutjhhtj-r/) Last week, Bill joined Shannon Bream on Fox News to discuss President Trump's Great American Economic Revival Industry Groups and Nancy Pelosi holding American businesses, workers, and families hostage. Listen above as Bill talks about the President's plan to open American businesses again and get the economy going again. **ICYMI: Chinese Communist Regime 's Cover-up of the Coronavirus is the "Crime of the Century"**In his latest interview with _Breitbart News,_ Bill calls for the Communist Chinese leadership and the World Health Organization (WHO) to be held accountable for COVID-19. China destroyed samples, silenced doctors and shut down air traffic within their country before shutting down international traffic, causing the virus to spread globally, while the WHO praised their transparency and handling of the health crisis. To listen to the interview and read more about China and the WHO's efforts to cover-up the impact of coronavirus, click**[ HERE.](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-nuklhkl-fuutjhhtj-y/)** **Beijing Biden** For years Joe Biden has been cozying up to the Communist Chinese leadership. In 2013, he secured his son, Hunter Biden, a position on the board of directors for a Chinese private-equity fund, where he continues to serve despite announcing his resignation in October 2019. Biden is a friend of Communist China. Click to share this graphic on Bill's **[Twitter](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-nuklhkl-fuutjhhtj-j/) **and **[Facebook.](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-nuklhkl-fuutjhhtj-t/)**
## **Be a Part of #TeamHagerty**
[TELL US WHY YOU SUPPORT BILL HAGERTY](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-nuklhkl-fuutjhhtj-i/) [DONATE TO THE CAMPAIGN](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-nuklhkl-fuutjhhtj-d/) [VOLUNTEER WITH #TEAMHAGERTY](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-nuklhkl-fuutjhhtj-h/)
## **Press Highlights**
**[Chattanooga Times Free Press:](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-nuklhkl-fuutjhhtj-k/) **Hagerty: Coverup by China's communist leaders causes global destruction**[TN Star:](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-nuklhkl-fuutjhhtj-u/) **Bill Hagerty Releases New TV Ad Slamming Communist China's Wuhan Coronavirus Coverup**[Fox News:](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-nuklhkl-fuutjhhtj-m/) **President Trump Announces Bill Hagerty As A Member Of The Economic Advisory Board**[Breitbart:](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-nuklhkl-fuutjhhtj-c/) **Fmr U.S. Ambassador to Japan Hagerty: Holding China Accountable 'Critically Important' -- 'It's Just Unforgivable'
## **What They're Saying...**
> _" Let me take a moment to say what a blessing it is to have someone like Bill Hagerty. He is not only my friend but he's done a great job...as the Ambassador to Japan. But not only that, he is a huge supporter of law enforcement. I can't tell you how much he's helped me personally and...in Putnam County."_
> [-Eddie Farris, Sheriff](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-nuklhkl-fuutjhhtj-q/) _" You may have questions about who to vote for and who to get out and elect this campaign season, and I want you to know where I stand. I stand with Bill Hagerty because of the fine values he has and he supports our President Donald J Trump. I ask for you to get out there and support Bill Hagerty and his campaign."_
> [-Mayor Robby Hatcher](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-nuklhkl-fuutjhhtj-a/) _" After looking Bill in the eye, I can fully vouch for the fact that he is a pro-life, Second Amendment custodian in full support of our president's agenda. Without hesitation, I intend to support and vote for him and humbly ask that you do as well."_
> _[-](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-nuklhkl-fuutjhhtj-f/)_[ Jeff Broyles](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-nuklhkl-fuutjhhtj-z/) _" I know that Bill Hagerty will work with President Trump, just as he did while Ambassador to Japan, to protect our farmers and make sure that they are treated fairly when it comes to trade. He has my support to be Tennessee's next Senator."_
> [-Mayor Rick Graham](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-nuklhkl-fuutjhhtj-v/) _" Bill Hagerty is running for the United States Senate to combat the radical socialists and their agenda. I know Bill will stand with President Donald Trump to protect my conservative values and the conservative values of so many Tennesseans across the state."_
> [-Michael Tedder](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-nuklhkl-fuutjhhtj-e/) _" I know that Bill Hagerty is a good quality Republican. He knows the value of conservative judges and is going to fight to support President Donald Trump. The President and I will continue to come back and support Bill Hagerty."_
> [-Nikki Haley](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-nuklhkl-fuutjhhtj-s/) _" That's why it's very important that we send a senator to Washington, D.C., who understands how dangerous this is and who will stop the Democrats' extremely liberal agenda. I believe that representative is Bill Hagerty, a fiscal conservative running for the United States Senate who is endorsed by President Trump."_
> [-Kenneth Eaton](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-nuklhkl-fuutjhhtj-g/) _" I am supporting Bill Hagerty for Senate because he will continue fighting for family-owned farms, like mine, to ensure we have the resources necessary to compete on a global scale and win."_
> [-Charlotte Kelley](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-nuklhkl-fuutjhhtj-w/) _"__Tennessee loving Bill Hagerty, who was my Tennessee Victory Chair and is now the very outstanding Ambassador to Japan, will be running for the U.S. Senate. He is strong on crime, borders & our 2nd A. Loves our Military & our Vets. Has my Complete & Total Endorsement!"_
> [-President Donald Trump](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-nuklhkl-fuutjhhtj-yd/)
| [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-nuklhkl-fuutjhhtj-yh/)| [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-nuklhkl-fuutjhhtj-yk/)| [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-nuklhkl-fuutjhhtj-yu/)| [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-nuklhkl-fuutjhhtj-jl/)| [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-nuklhkl-fuutjhhtj-jr/)

subject: President Trump is Right!

body:

| Friends, President Trump is once again putting America first. I wholeheartedly agree with his announcement to halt all immigration while we are trying to keep our own citizens safe and reopen our economy. In fact, this week, [I laid out my Conservative Strategic Agenda to get America Back-To-Work](https://mannysethi.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jhulhdkk-uunkhiuw-j/). [I hope you'll read my op-ed in the Tennessean today](https://mannysethi.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jhulhdkk-uunkhiuw-t/) on how we can re-open our economy and do so safely. I will stand with President Trump and work with him every day to achieve our shared values and goals. **Would you send President Trump the reinforcements he needs?** [DONATE $5](https://mannysethi.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jhulhdkk-uunkhiuw-i/) [DONATE $10](https://mannysethi.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jhulhdkk-uunkhiuw-d/) [DONATE $25](https://mannysethi.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jhulhdkk-uunkhiuw-h/) [DONATE $100](https://mannysethi.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jhulhdkk-uunkhiuw-k/) [DONATE OTHER AMOUNT](https://mannysethi.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jhulhdkk-uunkhiuw-u/) I would greatly appreciate anything you can do to pitch in. I know this is a difficult time for everyone but I can't do this without you! We need to send a conservative outsider to Washington and give President Trump reinforcements. All the best, Dr. Manny P.S. I hope you'll tune in to my [Virtual Town Hall today on Facebook ](https://mannysethi.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jhulhdkk-uunkhiuw-o/)at 5 central to hear exactly why we must send a conservative outsider to represent us in Washington. Copyright © 2019 Paid for by Dr. Manny for Senate, All rights reserved.

| | | Friend, I hope that you and your family are staying safe and healthy during this uncertain time. _**The 7th Congressional District Convention that was originally scheduled for this Saturday, April 25th has been postponed**_. The nomination process for the 7th District is still happening, _we just do not have a date yet_. My campaign will make it a priority to keep you informed. _As always, reach out to us with any questions and we will promptly address your concerns_. **Please join me for a campaign and convention update tomorrow, Wednesday, at 5:00 pm. | | Friend, It seems Earth Day becomes more important each year. Earth Day offers a new opportunity to recommit ourselves to tackling climate change head on as the federal government continues to roll back essential environmental protections. Environmental protection must be a priority if we want a healthier and more sustainable future for all. That's why the House DFL established the Climate Action Caucus, which I am proud to lead. Will you make a refundable $50 (or $100 per couple) contribution to the Minnesota House DFL?**With your support, we can strengthen our House DFL Majority, flip the Minnesota Senate, and make our climate initiatives a reality.** _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately_ [**Refundable $50**](https://act.myngp.com/el/r_AgQ6WYBJCdYy0ijwsjGP_ODtmZ5T1YfukkZuaeg8A=/XPgesbG8x5_GslB_IsBrUiU7ScTg4XHYXd5Y0OUAS54=?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=042220) [**Refundable $100**](https://act.myngp.com/el/r_AgQ6WYBJCdYy0ijwsjGP_ODtmZ5T1YfukkZuaeg8A=/XPgesbG8x5_GslB_IsBrUiU7ScTg4XHYXd5Y0OUAS54=?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=042220) _You can donate $50 (or $100 per couple) and it will be refunded to you by the state through the Minnesota Political Contribution Refund Program._ If the federal government won't lead on climate change, we will. * * *
Peter --

Trump wants to force states to open for business, despite the COVID-19 epidemic.

_This goes against our nation's best health care experts' advice!_

**But Trump is hellbent on getting his way -- and the _New York Times_ just reported one of Trump's most outrageous comments yet.**
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/17222347/187113745/1499422570?refcode=VC_UD_20200422_EMPOLL_E1_Cuomo_T0-S0SL0C0_SW&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImFhZmJjYjVmLWE0ODQtZWExMS1hOTRjLTAwMTU1ZDAzYjFlOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ojgPC-rQF0bADh1jFs1OkFx6YOr9XgjcSlMZbWlmcIY=&emci=cd1000e7-fb83-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=aafbcb5f-a484-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=4584036)
Trump thinks he can command anything he wants as president.

**Thankfully, Democrats have leaders like Gov. Andrew Cuomo. He knows the REAL laws of this country and just _SHUT. Trump. Down!!_**
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/17222348/187113746/1499422570?refcode=VC_UD_20200422_EMPOLL_E1_Cuomo_T0-S0SL0C0_SW&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImFhZmJjYjVmLWE0ODQtZWExMS1hOTRjLTAwMTU1ZDAzYjFlOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ojgPC-rQF0bADh1jFs1OkFx6YOr9XgjcSlMZbWlmcIY=&emci=cd1000e7-fb83-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=aafbcb5f-a484-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=4584036)
Andrew Cuomo is SO RIGHT -- as much as Trump might wish, he is NOT a king.

[**We're super impressed by Andrew Cuomo's take-down of Trump's dumb comments. He's a true leader for his state in this crisis. But we need to know what the public thinks. name: MJ Hegar
subject: an earth for our kids
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
We need to act now to make sure that our kids have an Earth that's healthy and habitable.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890331/7f51f7bc/4f058a5e/4ef101f9/1427982176/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | I have two young kids, Peter, and I want to make sure that they grow up on a planet that's healthy and habitable for their future. Right now, we're not on a path for that to happen.

Right now, we're on a path where our kids are going to see devastation all across Texas and America, from farming communities hit by severe droughts to coastal communities pummeled by stronger and more frequent hurricanes. **Sen. Cornyn is making matters worse, dismissing the effects of climate change by saying "It's summer." (Seriously!)** **[**CHIP IN TO DEFEAT HIM**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890331/7f51f7bc/4f058a5e/4ef101f8/1427982176/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEyNzEiLCJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIxMCJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-earthday?refcode=email_20200422.1nd__1271__&amount=10")** Climate change is already hurting our communities -- thousand-year floods are happening _way_ more often than they should, hurricanes are wreaking havoc all across the coast, droughts are destroying our crops. On Earth Day, let's take a minute to think about the future we're leaving for our kids **\-- and dedicate ourselves to changing it.**

**I 'm committed to passing policies in the U.S. Senate that will combat climate change and leave this planet in better shape for future generations. Can I count on you to help me leave a better world for our kids?** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

name: Tina Smith
subject: Re: USPS
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
|
#
Without emergency funding, the United States Postal Service is at risk of running out of money by June as the economic impact of the coronavirus continues to take its toll. Shortly after, it could collapse. But Donald Trump is refusing to provide relief. Look, we need a functioning postal service, especially during this pandemic. Americans depend on the USPS to receive their wages, benefits, medicine, and now more than ever, mail ballots to safely vote from home. **By weakening the USPS’s ability to deliver ballots, vote-by-mail will become nearly impossible — which would disenfranchise millions of eligible voters.** That’s why I’m asking: **[Will you sign my urgent petition to demand emergency relief to save more than 500,000 essential workers’ jobs and keep the USPS operational? This fight is too important for Trump’s partisan games. Sign if you agree.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17226439/187178096/116791449?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5M2MxZDhkMS1iYjg0LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fOy3Fq_FaffKwj5i02jn3hBUPN9zeW3GHEAGvVyfNv8=&emci=92c1d8d1-bb84-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=93c1d8d1-bb84-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=6227932)** | [Add your name](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17226440/187178097/116791449?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5M2MxZDhkMS1iYjg0LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fOy3Fq_FaffKwj5i02jn3hBUPN9zeW3GHEAGvVyfNv8=&emci=92c1d8d1-bb84-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=93c1d8d1-bb84-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=6227932)

clean_body: | Without emergency funding, the United States Postal Service is at risk of running out of money by June as the economic impact of the coronavirus continues to take its toll. Shortly after, it could collapse. But Donald Trump is refusing to provide relief. Look, we need a functioning postal service, especially during this pandemic. Americans depend on the USPS to receive their wages, benefits, medicine, and now more than ever, mail ballots to safely vote from home. By weakening the USPS’s ability to deliver ballots, vote-by-mail will become nearly impossible — which would disenfranchise millions of eligible voters. That’s why I’m asking: | We cannot allow the President to leave hundreds of thousands of Americans without jobs and tens of millions without the important services they provide. It’s critical we do everything we can to keep the USPS functioning throughout this public health crisis and through the November election. — Tina Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota Tina Smith for Minnesota PO Box 14362 St. Paul, MN 55114 United States Contributions or gifts to Tina Smith for Minnesota are not tax-deductible.

body:

While COVID-19 continues to spread around the world, the need to take climate action remains as urgent as ever. **Just recently, Trump’s EPA announced it will stop enforcing environmental regulations on companies during the COVID-19 crisis** \-- companies now have free rein to pollute our waterways, air, and environment as much as they please. **This is unacceptable.** There’s no doubt that businesses need support during this time, but causing further pollution to our environment, ecosystems, and natural resources is not the right solution. [**That’s why we’re asking you to step up and take action. Sign our petition now DEMANDING Trump reverse this terrible environmental decision.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17226780/187187176/210602472?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOTMyNTBlZC1iZTg0LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qJrasSFDY5TIbKg0-gNJ5iKqAasquhwISJlXiLsMaR4=&emci=a4838a0a-b884-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=f93250ed-be84-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=9814644) This decision couldn't come at a more dangerous time for our country. People need clean air and water more than ever before! Things like particulate matter, smog, and sulfur oxides are known to seriously damage the lungs and can lead to trouble breathing, aggravated asthma, chronic obstructive pulmonary disease (COPD), and even premature death. **These pollutants are especially dangerous to people with respiratory conditions, which is particularly concerning when we have a respiratory pandemic gripping the country.** | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17226781/187187177/210602472?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOTMyNTBlZC1iZTg0LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qJrasSFDY5TIbKg0-gNJ5iKqAasquhwISJlXiLsMaR4=&emci=a4838a0a-b884-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=f93250ed-be84-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=9814644)

\-- The whole team at Margaret Good for Congress

clean_body: Happy Earth Day, friend, Today is the 50th anniversary of Earth Day and the anniversary of the signing of the Paris Agreement to take climate action. While COVID-19 continues to spread around the world, the need to take climate action remains as urgent as ever. Just recently, Trump’s EPA announced it will stop enforcing environmental regulations on companies during the COVID-19 crisis \-- companies now have free rein to pollute our waterways, air, and environment as much as they please. This is unacceptable. There’s no doubt that businesses need support during this time, but causing further pollution to our environment, ecosystems, and natural resources is not the right solution. This decision couldn't come at a more dangerous time for our country. People need clean air and water more than ever before! Things like particulate matter, smog, and sulfur oxides are known to seriously damage the lungs and can lead to trouble breathing, aggravated asthma, chronic obstructive pulmonary disease (COPD), and even premature death. These pollutants are especially dangerous to people with respiratory conditions, which is particularly concerning when we have a respiratory pandemic gripping the country. | It’s so crucial that we take care of this planet we live on, not just today, but everyday -- for the sake of our natural resources, wildlife, and even our own survival. So, thanks for doing your part to protect our shared planet. Happy Earth Day! \-- The whole team at Margaret Good for Congress P.S. Sign the petition and we’ll automatically send you a registration link for our upcoming webinar with Senior VP of Government Affairs at the League of Conservation Voters (LCV), Tiernan Sittenfeld. | To be removed from this email list, please . name: Teresa Tomlinson
subject: Two major endorsements
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TERESA TOMLINSON FOR SENATE
body:
| |
---

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17226863/187190681/-779694663?refcode=em042220-header-am&refcode2=d6b7c85d-c084-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NDI2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNmI3Yzg1ZC1jMDg0LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Tpgcav_DBzn_3QpGJm2T94nupLVbBPcdA0Td1furrQg=) **** | | Friend, I am honored to share two endorsements with you today that mean a great deal to me personally.

One cannot run for office as a Georgia Democrat without being acutely aware of our state’s political history — one grounded in struggle, protest, and ultimate progress, led by the African-American, faith, and labor communities.

Today the progress most of us had assumed was settled is once again in jeopardy. From the dismantling of the Voting Rights Act to the threat to in-person and mail-in balloting, there seems to be no end to voter suppression. It is clear that we must finish the fight for equal rights. This election is everything. We cannot wait another day for justice.

**That is why I am incredibly humbled to share with you that Martin Luther King, III and Valerie Jackson have joined us in this journey. They, too, refuse to wait a day longer. It is my honor to receive both of their endorsements in our race for the United States Senate.**

Martin Luther King, III served as the fourth President of the Southern Christian Leadership Conference and continues to advocate for civil and human rights in America and across the world. He is the son of the late Martin Luther King, Jr. and Coretta Scott King, and continues along with the King family to carry on their parents’ legacy at The King Center in Atlanta.
* * *
_“I’m asking you to join me in voting for Teresa Tomlinson for U.S. Senate. True leaders exercise bold action to do what is right. As Mayor of Columbus, Georgia, Teresa tackled tough issues and made transformational change. She made Columbus better through good government, and she will do the same for our state and our country in the United States Senate.”

—Martin Luther King, III_
* * *
Valerie represented the city of Atlanta as First Lady while her late husband Maynard H. Jackson served with honor and distinction as the first Black Mayor of Atlanta — a first for any major city in the South. Valerie is a business owner, nonprofit leader, and an award-winning radio host, and it is thanks to her efforts that Atlanta had the privilege of hosting the 1988 Democratic National Convention and 1996 Summer Olympics.
* * *
_“Maynard often said being the mayor of a major American city is the most difficult job in politics. As Mayor of Columbus, Teresa Tomlinson led one of the 25 best-run cities in America. Her years of public service have well prepared her to serve in the U.S. Senate during this difficult time for our country. Join me in supporting this intelligent, accomplished and determined woman as our next U.S. Senator.”

—Former First Lady of Atlanta, Valerie Jackson_
* * *
**[Friend, I am honored to have these endorsements, but I need your support in order to compete against David Perdue’s limitless corporate PAC donations. Every donation brings us closer to winning this election, turning Georgia blue and bending the arc of our nation’s history toward justice once again — please pitch in today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17226864/187190682/-779694663?refcode=em042220-a&refcode2=d6b7c85d-c084-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NDI2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNmI3Yzg1ZC1jMDg0LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Tpgcav_DBzn_3QpGJm2T94nupLVbBPcdA0Td1furrQg=)** | | If you've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:

clean_body: | | | | = ** | | Friend, I am honored to share two endorsements with you today that mean a great deal to me personally. One cannot run for office as a Georgia Democrat without being acutely aware of our state’s political history — one grounded in struggle, protest, and ultimate progress, led by the African-American, faith, and labor communities. Today the progress most of us had assumed was settled is once again in jeopardy. From the dismantling of the Voting Rights Act to the threat to in-person and mail-in balloting, there seems to be no end to voter suppression. It is clear that we must finish the fight for equal rights. This election is everything. We cannot wait another day for justice. That is why I am incredibly humbled to share with you that Martin Luther King, III and Valerie Jackson have joined us in this journey. They, too, refuse to wait a day longer. It is my honor to receive both of their endorsements in our race for the United States Senate. Martin Luther King, III served as the fourth President of the Southern Christian Leadership Conference and continues to advocate for civil and human rights in America and across the world. He is the son of the late Martin Luther King, Jr. and Coretta Scott King, and continues along with the King family to carry on their parents’ legacy at The King Center in Atlanta. “I’m asking you to join me in voting for Teresa Tomlinson for U.S. Senate. True leaders exercise bold action to do what is right. As Mayor of Columbus, Georgia, Teresa tackled tough issues and made transformational change. She made Columbus better through good government, and she will do the same for our state and our country in the United States Senate.” —Martin Luther King, III Valerie represented the city of Atlanta as First Lady while her late husband Maynard H. Jackson served with honor and distinction as the first Black Mayor of Atlanta — a first for any major city in the South. Valerie is a business owner, nonprofit leader, and an award-winning radio host, and it is thanks to her efforts that Atlanta had the privilege of hosting the 1988 Democratic National Convention and 1996 Summer Olympics. “Maynard often said being the mayor of a major American city is the most difficult job in politics. As Mayor of Columbus, Teresa Tomlinson led one of the 25 best-run cities in America. Her years of public service have well prepared her to serve in the U.S. Senate during this difficult time for our country. Join me in supporting this intelligent, accomplished and determined woman as our next U.S. Senator.” —Former First Lady of Atlanta, Valerie Jackson = | | If you've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: = = = Yours truly, Teresa PAID FOR BY TERESA TOMLINSON FOR SENATE PMB 263, 3201 Macon Rd Ste 139, Columbus, GA 31906 =

name: Ethan
subject: Before it's too late
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Betsy Rader
body:
| | | |
---
---
Peter During this pandemic, our parks are full of people and we have a heightened appreciation for the efforts of the environmental heroes who preserved our natural resources to refresh and restore us during troubled times. Earth Day reminds us, this year more than ever, that the time to protect our beautiful world is _RIGHT NOW,_ before we've reached a point of no return. Now is the time to recognize that we must listen to scientists and experts in a timely way, not wait for their grim predictions to come true. _**But Ohio 's legislature is listening **_ _**to big-money lobbyists**_ _**instead of standing up for Ohio 's clean air and water. This has included: **_
* Bail-outs for coal plants
* Dismantling the state's renewable-energy and energy-efficiency standards
* Taking away local communities' abilities to regulate drilling
* and our Great Lakes region is seeing not only a lack of protection, but a jump in noncompliance with the Clean Water Act.

**Earth Day reminds us** **that on November 3, 2020,** _**we must elect people like Betsy**_ _**t**_ _**o the state legislature **_ _**to stand up for Ohio 's natural resources.**_ _[](https://act.myngp.com/el/MHgg9RuK6sIyVvuoxmkHhq16v1En_4QDyBTYzMRnPQI=/h9OpvRJ5-C4ORHFzGDkFO68B-bxEJZlPDKc-yeQtIbU=?refcode=earthday&amount=20)_ Thank you so much for your support and all the ways you make a difference for our planet. Sincerely, Ethan (Campaign Manager) and all of Team Betsy _P.S. Don 't forget, Friday April 24th is your last day to request an absentee ballot for the primary! And make sure it's post-marked by Monday April 27th!_
---
Paid for by Friends of Betsy Rader
---
Friends of Betsy Rader
PO Box 280
Novelty OH 44072 United States

subject: BREAKING: the endorsements keep coming 📨
body:
BREAKING: the endorsements keep coming 📨 | | | [View In Your Browser](https://mailchi.mp/nancymace.org/breaking-a-huge-endorsement-1937133?e=f1831b4ca2) [Forward To A Friend](http://us7.forward-to-friend.com/forward?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=5597335753&e=f1831b4ca2)
---
| | [](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=75f4f20344&e=f1831b4ca2)
---
| | Friend,

Wow. Big news from our campaign . . .

Bringing everybody together is so important to me, which is why I'm particularly excited to announce this **_HUGE endorsement_** for our campaign to take back the Lowcountry -- **House Minority Whip Steve Scalise.**

“I’m proud to endorse Nancy Mace for Congress," said Scalise.

"Nancy is a hard worker who is battle-tested. If Republicans are going to take the House majority back this fall, we need candidates like Nancy who can take the fight to the Democrats and their fundraising machines,” said Whip Scalise. “SC-01 has a winner in Nancy Mace.”
---
| [ ](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=2125ea3dba&e=f1831b4ca2)
---
| In order to take back the majority, **we must come together to defeat Joe Cunningham.**

I’m running a campaign that’s bringing conservatives and Republicans together \-- to represent _all_ of the Lowcountry.

People from all across the party, including the most fiscally conservative policy advocates like the Club for Growth, Sen. Rand Paul, Rep. Elise Stefanik, AND Republican leadership like Minority Leader Kevin McCarthy and Minority Whip Steve Scalise, are all **uniting behind my campaign****** because they know **_no one will work harder than I will_**.

I grew up here, I’m raising my family here and I have the right experience to win. I will always put the Lowcountry FIRST.

It’s time to unite and get to work - for the Lowcountry!

I can't thank you enough for your support.

Sincerely,

[](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=c04fc5eaf7&e=f1831b4ca2)

name: Charles Booker
subject: Why I proudly support a Green New Deal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
Today is the 50th anniversary of the first Earth Day. Here’s why I support a Green New Deal.
#
Hi Friend,
Today, April 22, 2020, marks the 50th anniversary of Earth Day. While our attention is drawn to other things right now, I wanted to take a moment to celebrate this day and tell you more about why I support a Green New Deal.
**[If you’re ready to pass a Green New Deal, will you chip in $5 or whatever you can to help me get to the Senate so I can help lead this fight?_I’ll explain why this is so important to me._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17228190/187212050/-1367995534?refcode=em20200422&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NDQyNDJkZi1jODg0LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Rj5qBy4xP91d7UdysmuE_ImPNPKq1OdGXDrMH_OPwgU=)**
****[Contribute $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17228191/187212051/-1367995534?refcode=em20200422&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NDQyNDJkZi1jODg0LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Rj5qBy4xP91d7UdysmuE_ImPNPKq1OdGXDrMH_OPwgU=)****
A Green New Deal is an integral part of our agenda to bring real, progressive change to Kentucky and our country.
Kentucky is one of the largest coal-producing states in the country, and our economy has been rocked by the decline of the coal industry. Other states are in similar positions. We need to build an economy that thrives on clean, renewable sources of energy — not one that depends on fossil fuels.
Aside from reviving our economy, I believe in a Green New Deal because I want to build a future in which my two young girls — and young people everywhere — can thrive.
**[I know that I’m the one that’ll make the Green New Deal happen. But I can’t get there without your help. Please, chip in $5, $15, whatever you can afford to our movement today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17228192/187212052/-1367995534?refcode=em20200422&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NDQyNDJkZi1jODg0LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Rj5qBy4xP91d7UdysmuE_ImPNPKq1OdGXDrMH_OPwgU=)**
****[Contribute $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17228193/187212053/-1367995534?refcode=em20200422&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NDQyNDJkZi1jODg0LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Rj5qBy4xP91d7UdysmuE_ImPNPKq1OdGXDrMH_OPwgU=)****
Our so-called leaders like Mitch McConnell don’t care to be honest with us about what the future holds. They certainly don’t care to ensure that future generations will have a viable planet to live on.
**They’ve ignored the environmental effects** on small farms that are fighting every day to stay afloat.
**They’ve ignored coal miners with Black Lung** , and coal communities that have lost vital revenue, and aren’t doing enough to make sure they aren’t left behind.
**And the longer they stay in office, the longer they’ll continue to ignore us and what we need to survive, much less thrive. **
Implementing a Green New Deal is just the first step towards addressing the climate crisis -- but it’s an important step, and one we need to take immediately.
**[Join us today and chip in whatever you can afford to our movement.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17228194/187212054/-1367995534?refcode=em20200422&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NDQyNDJkZi1jODg0LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Rj5qBy4xP91d7UdysmuE_ImPNPKq1OdGXDrMH_OPwgU=)**
Onward,
Charles

** **

****[Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17228195/187212055/-1367995534?refcode=em20200422-footer&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NDQyNDJkZi1jODg0LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Rj5qBy4xP91d7UdysmuE_ImPNPKq1OdGXDrMH_OPwgU=)****
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17228196/187212056/-640535987?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NDQyNDJkZi1jODg0LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Rj5qBy4xP91d7UdysmuE_ImPNPKq1OdGXDrMH_OPwgU=&emci=cbc427b3-bf84-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=444242df-c884-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=2635570) | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17228197/187212057/-778353598?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NDQyNDJkZi1jODg0LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Rj5qBy4xP91d7UdysmuE_ImPNPKq1OdGXDrMH_OPwgU=&emci=cbc427b3-bf84-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=444242df-c884-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=2635570) | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17228198/187212058/-1403296926?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NDQyNDJkZi1jODg0LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Rj5qBy4xP91d7UdysmuE_ImPNPKq1OdGXDrMH_OPwgU=&emci=cbc427b3-bf84-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=444242df-c884-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=2635570)

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Trump Suspension of Immigration Over Coronavirus Will Protect Our Health, Jobs and Wages
body:
"The left cannot continue to demand social distancing and delaying the return to work for some, while at the same time supporting more..." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=3663e24f4d&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **Trump Suspension of Immigration Over Coronavirus Will Protect Our Health, Jobs and Wages**

“President Trump is acting properly and justifiably to temporarily suspend immigration to the U.S. for at least 60 days in the face of the coronavirus pandemic,” former Acting Director of Immigration and Customs Enforcement Thomas Homan writes in Fox News.

Pausing immigration will put unemployed Americans first in line for jobs as our economy reopens, the President explained last night.

“The left cannot continue to demand social distancing and delaying the return to work for some, while at the same time supporting more people coming to the U.S. now. It makes zero sense,” Homan says.

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=698ea11bb8&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “The U.S. Senate on Tuesday unanimously approved $484 billion in additional coronavirus relief for the U.S. economy and hospitals treating people sickened by the pandemic, sending the measure to the House of Representatives for final passage later this week.” President Trump has pressed Congress for swift action, [_Reuters_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=1b78f677e8&e=3ee4985eea) reports.

Bush, according to research compiled by historian Martha Kumar,” Katherine Doyle reports for the [_Washington Examiner_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=5c0979fe2a&e=3ee4985eea).

Pausing immigration will put unemployed Americans first in line for jobs as our economy reopens, the President explained last night. “The left cannot continue to demand social distancing and delaying the return to work for some, while at the same time supporting more people coming to the U.S. now. subject: A Message From The Justice Josiah Coleman Campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Committee to Re-Elect Josiah Coleman | Reviewed and approved by Justice Josiah Coleman
body:
Hopefully you are all staying healthy and happy in these unusual times. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/18f3a2c74f15/a-message-from-the-justice-josiah-coleman-campaign-7060526?e=933d5e1643)
---
| |
---
|
---
| | Friends,

Hopefully you are all staying healthy and happy in these unusual times.

We are helping [Justice Josiah Coleman](https://judgejosiahcoleman.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=02c6e22caa047d366ea08d990&id=cea43102cc&e=933d5e1643) with his campaign for re-election to the Mississippi Supreme Court.

With events and meetings being out of the question at the moment, we are campaigning using phone calls, emails, and social media. Many of you have asked how you can help.

First, please consider a contribution. You can contribute online at [ColemanForJustice.com](https://judgejosiahcoleman.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=02c6e22caa047d366ea08d990&id=fbdb435cc5&e=933d5e1643). A donation of any amount is appreciated.

Follow Josiah on social media via [Facebook](https://judgejosiahcoleman.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=02c6e22caa047d366ea08d990&id=5b10672979&e=933d5e1643), [Twitter](https://judgejosiahcoleman.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=02c6e22caa047d366ea08d990&id=df991ca63c&e=933d5e1643), or [Instagram](https://judgejosiahcoleman.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=02c6e22caa047d366ea08d990&id=f0bcbdd214&e=933d5e1643). Liking and sharing our posts will help us get the word out about the campaign. Forwarding this email to others will also help.

Host a conference call or Zoom video call. Josiah has joined several Zoom calls recently to speak and answer questions about the campaign. Please let us know if you’d be willing to put a group together and host a call on our behalf. We would love to work with you to get that scheduled. [Or volunteer to help in other ways.](https://judgejosiahcoleman.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=02c6e22caa047d366ea08d990&id=30c02fbd2f&e=933d5e1643)

Thanks!

Jordan Brumbelow
[Jordan@ColemanForJustice.com](mailto:Jordan@ColemanForJustice.com)
901.606.8983

Justin Brasell
[Justin@ColemanForJustice.com](mailto:Justin@ColemanForJustice.com)
601.317.0644
---

name: Mondaire Jones
subject: Earth Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mondaire for Congress_ Our mailing address is:
body:
Today marks the 50th anniversary of Earth Day. It began as a celebration to show support for environmental protections and reform. Unfortunately, today these issues have far greater urgency than they did 50 years ago. | | | [
](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/-AA/ni0YAA/t.315/eAC6sN7XQb6ISIKzSPNhmg/h0/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNIulfLjtYeUg3tGrlbz-2BvWov6-2B0H1bYcYjVvuyBRGf7biLoqvAT5Hx3fJv-2Bf3LmVYwOCRqFutQkRlBsIgE-2BDAi8B6rGQr2LIx0dV935tNLBRd2-2BuN34TDJWG29JHnzwzzHjLJff5k9yJl-2Be3z6C0tW1OThbnoJY3D5ge-2BrQZvclA4uDSNvecw36LaQ1d1Y5IGKG9Er-2FZ-2B97ojySlMnoVyNC/gFQE) Friend, **** **** **** Today marks the 50th anniversary of Earth Day. It began as a celebration to show support for environmental protections and reform. Unfortunately, today these issues have far greater urgency than they did 50 years ago.
This issue is personal to me. I’m part of a generation that will be devastated by climate catastrophe because career politicians have failed to act with the urgency this crisis requires. That’s why I have put forth the most ambitious climate platform of anyone in my race. That includes:
* Enacting a Green New Deal, which would transition America to 100% renewable energy and avert climate catastrophe, creating 20 million good-paying jobs in the process. Co-sponsoring Rep. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez’s Green New Deal for Public Housing Act (H.R. 5185), which would invest up to $180 billion over 10 years in sustainable retrofits.
* Re-entering the Paris Climate Accords.
* Replacing the decommissioned Indian Point nuclear power plant with clean, renewable energy sources and ensuring that spent fuel rods are safely relocated from our densely populated community.
* Fighting for a one-seat train from Rockland into New York City and Westchester that will make Rockland County a more environmentally friendly, accessible, and attractive place to live.
* Restoring and expanding light rail, which we previously had in places like Ossining and Peekskill.

From Day One of my campaign, I have centered a Green New Deal as my number one priority. If we do not have a planet to inhabit, none of the other issues we care about matter so much. Throughout this campaign, I have joined youth activists all across the district to demand that our leaders take the bold, aggressive actions needed to halt climate catastrophe. [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/-AA/ni0YAA/t.315/eAC6sN7XQb6ISIKzSPNhmg/h1/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNIulfLjtYeUg3tGrlbz-2BvWov6-2B0H1bYcYjVvuyBRGf7btPQuEl1IeCS-2BAzDF02ZRMcZ8-2BBfWxH0UUudHuwL4CWIrH-2FX44UyGg4q3kItb1WgSJK6DgF7xKWB2xwpOSJRNb8yliwKfUxO-2BHW-2BKkctv-2FXm4vST7R6IaFlp0K-2Bn10PvGzgSljHAfyngnVXXMI1CLMWvzuhaQcw0Y3AHyYMKD0Lq/yzhY)
[](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/-AA/ni0YAA/t.315/eAC6sN7XQb6ISIKzSPNhmg/h2/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNIulfLjtYeUg3tGrlbz-2BvWov6-2B0H1bYcYjVvuyBRGf7bjWR62XZ1yE0WQt8WYNcPbtfIXw5xPV3dsQwfPoKxQvnn0QfRe72kGYbWjtfpPT8wl9lz9VofJYzL-2FlfRq0mHCTU5kD-2FWHZvLrMl6pWyIEQ55f4fMXXfE7rkEFCh1ZaLKtUhSxoH6TLEWicGwqRpG1x9WIS3Nt03D2jKU7n0YQAJ/OQC6)
The crisis we face is enormous, but I am inspired by the millions of people, especially young people, standing up and demanding action. Our campaign is part of that movement, and I hope you will join us so we can elect a true climate champion for Rockland and Westchester Counties. **_[If you believe the time to act is now, sign up for a volunteer shift here](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/-AA/ni0YAA/t.315/eAC6sN7XQb6ISIKzSPNhmg/h3/eT8CD8GGYEaI-2F-2BM77OuyYlTkKo2thtj-2FTTlQYuoOB3vk4z0SKQ-2FYdt31KDWR51J-2B-2Fg3sVo3fNzsbpGrWBh1bUQzG7VSHUPQl9fCL-2FICazV-2Be6oOi-2FrSHMc8SA0g4nJYRJ705IGuagcEiDsU8vqcWUZD3yc0ZQiX53dTgE-2BYpDuTSzh0rJx2DhpfhGp20XuDjfosjAIPbJEFygs0l-2Ff6GXQ-3D-3D/BDvG)_**. Together, we can accomplish anything.
Thank you, Mondaire
[Donate >>](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/-AA/ni0YAA/t.315/eAC6sN7XQb6ISIKzSPNhmg/h4/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNIulfLjtYeUg3tGrlbz-2BvWov6-2B0H1bYcYjVvuyBRGf7bvBcKafXcYTP4mOM8U3Pj5TJiyXe-2Bi7pC2-2BgFhdVvFZdQcjl6MpaUqnKYnoN1AUmzLzNX-2FtrAJfcA-2FZIJymx2fOvycC4dnEhK0jfmsHrBKkND2E3972bl-2FrARh1JHek0KcJIiTb-2BSC-2BkeQ5CN2rAhJADAmu4L4KvKlAi-2FEiAo6zu/nDA4)

name: John Hickenlooper
subject: Earth Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
body:
|
#
Happy Earth Day, folks! 50 years ago, I went to one of the first ever Earth Day demonstrations in Philadelphia. That day in 1970, millions of students, activists, and folks across the country took action to celebrate and protect our environment. I wish that everyone cared about our Earth as much as the millions who rallied on that first Earth Day. But decades later, right-wing special interests and politicians are attacking our planet and ignoring the existential threat of climate change. Washington is carving up our public lands and selling them to the highest bidder. The Trump Administration is rolling back key environmental protections. And Washington Republicans, like my opponent Cory Gardner, refuse to act on climate change. We need to fight back and save our planet. I’ve got a bold plan to combat climate change, and to get to net zero carbon emissions by 2050 — or sooner! But I need your help to get to the U.S. Senate first. **If you’re financially able, can you add a contribution to our campaign to help us flip Colorado blue? Every dollar you give will help me fight in the Senate to protect our environment and preserve our public lands for generations to come.** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Chip in $10 now ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17229320/187230448/324007321?refcode=jwh-em-200422&express_lane=true&amount=10&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNGU1MzUyZi1kMDg0LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0hFAfzvXH11WQU-t48TAwcHoRhiQalebsZ7pRXUY3tE=)

clean_body: | Happy Earth Day, folks! 50 years ago, I went to one of the first ever Earth Day demonstrations in Philadelphia. That day in 1970, millions of students, activists, and folks across the country took action to celebrate and protect our environment. I wish that everyone cared about our Earth as much as the millions who rallied on that first Earth Day. But decades later, right-wing special interests and politicians are attacking our planet and ignoring the existential threat of climate change. Washington is carving up our public lands and selling them to the highest bidder. The Trump Administration is rolling back key environmental protections. And Washington Republicans, like my opponent Cory Gardner, refuse to act on climate change. We need to fight back and save our planet. I’ve got a bold plan to combat climate change, and to get to net zero carbon emissions by 2050 — or sooner! But I need your help to get to the U.S. Senate first. If you’re financially able, can you add a contribution to our campaign to help us flip Colorado blue? Every dollar you give will help me fight in the Senate to protect our environment and preserve our public lands for generations to come. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = There is no state more beautiful than Colorado, and no better place to celebrate the gifts that nature has given us. I know many of you are itching to get outside — and believe me, I am too! — but we’ve got to do all that we can to stay healthy right now. Thank you, have a happy Earth Day, and — as always — stay safe and healthy. — John Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado Hickenlooper for Colorado PO Box 18886 Denver, CO 80218 United States

body:
Now that Bernie Sanders endorsed Joe Biden, the Democrats are going to pull out all of the stops in order to defeat President Trump this fall. Now, it's up to us to secure four more years of a Donald Trump presidency. It's up to us to keep the Senate red. It's up to us to protect our conservative values.
Now that Bernie Sanders endorsed Joe Biden, the Democrats are going to pull out all of the stops in order to defeat President Trump this fall.

And, Friend, we are President Trump's final line of defense. It's up to us to secure four more years of a Donald Trump presidency. It's up to us to keep the Senate red. It's up to us to protect our conservative values.

If we have any hope in reelecting President Trump, defending our Republican Senate, and saving our conservative agenda, we need to make sure we have the resources to compete with the Democrats' never-ending war chests, which is why [**I 've set a goal of raising $75,000 before midnight tonight.
**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ta1580Y3faEANVrqdkdvKQd52wOf5dQaTRp-kysbMI0cI382E-8WPmhTjamkPy-s3114xILTcyLjTf29t5OmXtDMQUW7VDgJ1w52tyOjckVF7RIXQGdZfxzerS2FUeBsYcAyruYv30hx1bUJODehvq6iLdCjB8kJfAOwoZut6hVwNfriaqvrLC7uVjjtWhYzQULNGGAK_fALgR13Z8qP_eYfeESO4LHuA6Ie9fSqluTM9_AuFANL1bJ8CNRrFuX3v6yzmI30hCHzF6MJQRdc-xy-877GPaDB_3jGmAkigvUoML2sgIaGB3cxK0-VTRyiH82P5Ir0-FSw7xKpGWL5ftdOcykC7K9_1T2PR9L6BvthuCxHES-lv-ZSu41ZAteASQdyL2jZUJLml0ZWrceaZU-ri6z_MsIS&c=ITub58gVLUdEaqsAKPWx9rZ2VfWEO3xh-Lco6CvxDZZt07D6Cu3v8w==&ch=LpWm_e14KOo5Y3CFWniGGpAMgXlbvIh22quIM3LBhHDE9I_OxT6aRg==)

Friend,

Absolutely unacceptable.

The Democrats have been bragging all week about their hyper-partisan political "victory." The "victory"? Holding up millions of dollars for small businesses across the country.

Now, Democratic candidates across the country are turning a blind eye to Nancy Pelosi and her liberal games. [**This is unacceptable.**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016wmavyyEZQD88y-Tpv2HRAiDTI6wcuF7kDGpZDVS8Hhdu58oraLBsmA8auc8A9tXFY9dgf9ivoCpakznbIUTB_AXYWFs_ooY0-7iB3JB5SEvWlqyksVCCvMHU9ARwbvuatfKNDqcCZazT4ZL-KfHSsCo5T0rXD3YTPV4JIhudXRFqeGWAuJZo8plJjjiMqSF2s3BqNTSzv16FR-thDSHIppLwl_z7OFqFvY9Y1u_HyjKDNPaHZBtfQ1CLR3e3JzGT_Zeb4oZkkHQtDztlhMIQ7GNxHSnrhfE7EeTJ5USJs5vZJ75AOuyYZzDohw2JGgDWbm7RSWnuEtYsgkba2moI0EDQ1ZLr-lXefd2i1m1SFxKAh_Oxk814qswsCdRYcCu7dYr0aCOWLXDBocJrTuKxA==&c=eVjU_LxqTbMNGOd0zflUzvfo1-DT6Exfne37cnDb1nxYzT3t2qf04Q==&ch=oF3WAPsqkDV4dunBaFNlAEklapuPEpQ_JAAzS469Ag_Uoz_9BeqsSw==)

clean_body: Absolutely unacceptable. The Democrats have been bragging all week about their hyper-partisan political "victory". The "victory"? Holding up millions of dollars for small businesses across the country. == == Friend, Absolutely unacceptable. The Democrats have been bragging all week about their hyper-partisan political "victory." The "victory"? Holding up millions of dollars for small businesses across the country. Now, Democratic candidates across the country are turning a blind eye to Nancy Pelosi and her liberal games. == Which is why it is more important than ever that Republicans take back the House. Nancy Pelosi and her liberal allies are toying with the livelihoods of millions of Americans and simultaneously ruining the backbone of our American economy, all in favor of pushing their own radical, socialist agenda. More than that, Pelosi is using her dark money super PAC to spend MILLIONS of dollars across the country to flip solid red seats - including Texas-23. == == == == == == == It's time to end the political games, protect American jobs, and get Congress back to work. I hope we can count on your support. GOP Alerts Paid for by Tony Gonzales for Congress 14439 NW Military Highway Suite 108 -1488 San Antonio, TX 78231 == | | Tony Gonzales for Congress | 14439 NW Military Highway, Suite 108 -1488, San Antonio, TX 78231 | | Sent by mailto:action@standupforliberty.net in collaboration with |

I got in this fight to promote our shared values: expanding health care access, improving education, and protecting voting rights for all Americans. **Those values are on the line and on the ballot in CA-25 and I 'm going to need you by my side until the end!**
**The special election on May 12 is just around the corner.[Can I count on you to split a donation between my campaign and Voter Protection Project today?](https://go.protectvoting.%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/vpp_christysmith_apr?refcode=VPP_EM_FR_200422_Surrogate_U1_X1&amount=25&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=9+-+Can+I+count+on+you+to+split+a+donation+b&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_FR_200422_Surrogate_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_FR_200422_Surrogate_U1_X1")**
[](https://go.protectvoting.%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vpp_christysmith_apr?refcode=VPP_EM_FR_200422_Surrogate_U1_X1&amount=25&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=10&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_FR_200422_Surrogate_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_FR_200422_Surrogate_U1_X1")
Let's go into the fall with the proof that Democrats CAN and WILL WIN in 2020!
Thanks for your support!
Christy Smith
Democratic Candidate for California's 25th District [Special Election]

name: Rob, Team Rodney
subject: Have you signed the First Lady's birthday card yet?
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Rodney for Congress
body:
Friend,
[_**Have you signed the First Lady 's birthday card yet? **_](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001uTzsIS5eSKXTzBTqnNeF5fZ5zRfwETMQdfJo4tqoxd5VsQM7Y8MWb1lfoUunpNjnqxqVQeZmAQMXoNerDpj2UOuz4Ajy9a1QrQgyocLCIITh7wkdiuSwV4SDP6ihkAjSxH-Deq3X7PiJeThsXCteWxb0vBFMQGEB3On7HvpgsK-3AYYJuzybPYytp0G0-qv3gGnDncv0mTOoTKsN6uhr4BwCgfKp7UPkeb20u-r8nFOJJ7BEy0jx4AFFfJVFLhIvS98t6uy_RF-6ArsVzQKEu3pOKqXvzgLdUBC5Er5ZMmlM8LhmWflsftgV_JfXW9q-jAmn5pRCK6ORbmAJ9OpxOQeZM-4bs_3RpBCAK1rLWs4SMZ9HcKep5Q==&c=hfS3jucIhj5-cXgJSGTizlwfdtnv_XMiEX5MndzzSfBD6bQ_rnut7w==&ch=8djNWBEUWQQOelNwmFIM8pVHXYHYNL3uXnHsGzrd4Rgw4QWKFlWRCw==)
Rodney Davis has asked that we reach out to patriots like you to make sure that you knew about the First Lady's birthday coming up on April 26th. We plan to surprise her with a digital birthday card filled with well wishes from all of Rodney's supporters. We wanted to make sure that you had the chance to sign her card!
****[**Sign First Lady Melania Trump 's birthday card>>>**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001uTzsIS5eSKXTzBTqnNeF5fZ5zRfwETMQdfJo4tqoxd5VsQM7Y8MWb1lfoUunpNjnqxqVQeZmAQMXoNerDpj2UOuz4Ajy9a1QrQgyocLCIITh7wkdiuSwV4SDP6ihkAjSxH-Deq3X7PiJeThsXCteWxb0vBFMQGEB3On7HvpgsK-3AYYJuzybPYytp0G0-qv3gGnDncv0mTOoTKsN6uhr4BwCgfKp7UPkeb20u-r8nFOJJ7BEy0jx4AFFfJVFLhIvS98t6uy_RF-6ArsVzQKEu3pOKqXvzgLdUBC5Er5ZMmlM8LhmWflsftgV_JfXW9q-jAmn5pRCK6ORbmAJ9OpxOQeZM-4bs_3RpBCAK1rLWs4SMZ9HcKep5Q==&c=hfS3jucIhj5-cXgJSGTizlwfdtnv_XMiEX5MndzzSfBD6bQ_rnut7w==&ch=8djNWBEUWQQOelNwmFIM8pVHXYHYNL3uXnHsGzrd4Rgw4QWKFlWRCw==)****

Melania Trump continues to be a role model for young people in the United States and is a wonderful First Lady, which is why we want to send her this card on her birthday - April 26th. body:

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17230043/187251792/606024911?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOGU4MWY5My1kODg0LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9wSVaE4Gpf3-x7vyMYrGUuwmBeH9s0-lFRGZw_YcliE=&emci=6be1ab02-ca84-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=d8e81f93-d884-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=10203249) _We know that COVID-19 has impacted so many in our community, and we have adapted our campaign to this changing environment. [Will you join us by signing our petition to demand action on climate change now? ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17230044/187251793/606024911?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOGU4MWY5My1kODg0LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9wSVaE4Gpf3-x7vyMYrGUuwmBeH9s0-lFRGZw_YcliE=&emci=6be1ab02-ca84-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=d8e81f93-d884-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=10203249)**
| **[Sign Now »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17230045/187251794/606024911?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOGU4MWY5My1kODg0LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9wSVaE4Gpf3-x7vyMYrGUuwmBeH9s0-lFRGZw_YcliE=&emci=6be1ab02-ca84-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=d8e81f93-d884-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=10203249)**
---
Team,

We’re extremely proud of Eugene’s record as a climate leader here in Pennsylvania. As Auditor General, he detailed the devastating economic impacts of climate change and proposed detailed recommendations on how Pennsylvania’s state government can take action now.

**Eugene’s staunch dedication to protecting our environment earned him the endorsement of the League of Conservation Voters, an organization dedicated to fighting climate change.** But Eugene’s opponent, Scott Perry, has one of the worst records in Congress on climate and the environment. In fact, his lifetime score from the LCV sits at just 2 percent! _This is unacceptable, team._

[**Will you join us now in calling on Congress to take immediate action to stop climate change?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17230046/187251795/606024911?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOGU4MWY5My1kODg0LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9wSVaE4Gpf3-x7vyMYrGUuwmBeH9s0-lFRGZw_YcliE=&emci=6be1ab02-ca84-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=d8e81f93-d884-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=10203249)
**[Demand Action »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17230047/187251796/606024911?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOGU4MWY5My1kODg0LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9wSVaE4Gpf3-x7vyMYrGUuwmBeH9s0-lFRGZw_YcliE=&emci=6be1ab02-ca84-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=d8e81f93-d884-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=10203249)**
---

South Central Pennsylvanians deserve a proven, dedicated leader like Eugene who will work to tackle critical issues like climate change and build a green economy by investing in clean and renewable energy. In Congress, he will always fight to protect our planet by taking these issues head on.

Thank you,

Team Eugene Follow Eugene on social media for campaign updates:

name: Stacey Abrams
subject: I need you, friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
Let me explain... ground.
Friend,
In a moment, I'm going to ask you to make a donation to Reverend Raphael Warnock's campaign for U.S. Senate in Georgia. **But first, let me explain why I am proud to endorse him and why your support is so critical.**
In 2018, we built a diverse coalition of hardworking folks from all over Georgia, especially Georgians from marginalized communities who felt unseen and unheard. Our fight was rooted in the belief that poverty is immoral, that Georgians deserve access to affordable health care and that the economy ought to work for everyone.
The fact is, people in the White House and the U.S. Senate are failing Georgians of every political party, every race and every region.
The Republican Party's divisive agenda - and systematic voter suppression - goes against everything we stand for as Americans. But here's what gives me hope: All around the country, good people - including many folks who have never been involved with politics before - are stepping up to fight back and defend American values. We have the grassroots energy we need to restore this nation's democracy - and if we all do our part in 2020 to elect leaders who share these values, I know we can make our vision for the country a reality.
That's why I am so excited Reverend Raphael Warnock, a champion for Georgians in the fight for justice, announced he is running for U.S. Senate. Reverend Warnock is a strong leader, a pastor and an advocate - and he would be the first black senator our state has ever elected. **[If you are as ready as I am to support Reverend Warnock's campaign, please give $5 or more right now so we can flip Georgia blue and take back the Senate for Democrats in 2020.](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/m/60b3e73a/288179be/a02f336/348e8b36/3338935628/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoid2Fybm9jay1mb3ItZ2VvcmdpYV9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrMTY2LWZyLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ%3D%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warnock-for-georgia_email?refcode=jtk166-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
Reverend Warnock knows the incredible movement we built in Georgia in 2018, and he's determined to build the energy we need all the way to the ballot box in November. He's ready to fight voter suppression, ensure that health care is protected and expanded and break barriers to opportunity so that future generations know that the sky is the limit.
For the past 15 years, I have watched Reverend Warnock lead on issues of social justice, economic access and voting rights. We stood shoulder to shoulder on the toughest fights, against opponents who used their power to belittle and erase their fellow Georgians. He's dedicated his life to public service, and I know _without a doubt_ that he will be a strong advocate for folks in every corner of our state.
**But if we are going to build momentum and flip Georgia blue in 2020, we need to show Reverend Warnock - and a Republican Party that thinks they can steal this seat by spending millions of dollars and suppressing the vote - that we have a grassroots movement strong enough to win. That is why I need supporters like YOU to help us get this campaign off the ground. **
**[So please, friend, will you give $5 now- as much as you can spare - to help Reverend Warnock win this Senate seat, flip Georgia blue and ensure our constitutional rights are protected in the years to come? ](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/m/60b3e73a/288179be/a02f336/348e8b36/3338935628/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoid2Fybm9jay1mb3ItZ2VvcmdpYV9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrMTY2LWZyLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ%3D%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warnock-for-georgia_email?refcode=jtk166-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
Thank you for your support.
Stacey Abrams
| [Contribute](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/m/60b3e73a/288179be/a02f336/348e8b36/3338935628/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoid2Fybm9jay1mb3ItZ2VvcmdpYV9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrMTY2LWZyLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ%3D%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warnock-for-georgia_email?refcode=jtk166-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")
---

But if we are going to build momentum and flip Georgia blue in 2020, we need to show Reverend Warnock - and a Republican Party that thinks they can steal this seat by spending millions of dollars and suppressing the vote - that we have a grassroots movement strong enough to win. That is why I need supporters like YOU to help us get this campaign off the ground. "" Thank you for your support. Stacey Abrams | ""

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Today, I'm proud to endorse these 20 Democrats
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren Democrats
body:
2020 is the most important election of our lives. We need to win back the White House -- but we can't stop there. To put people first as we work through this crisis -- and to make big, structural... | | | [](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285257c2/45c30650/1f59a0f99/66e916d8/2250700424/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
2020 is the most important election of our lives.

We need to win back the White House -- but we can't stop there. To put people first as we work through this crisis -- and to make big, structural change in 2021 and beyond -- we need to elect Democrats up and down the ballot.

**So today, I 'm proud to endorse 20 Democrats who will keep up the fight in state houses, Congress, and seats of power across the country -- with more to come.** Shea Backus (NV HD-37)

Jennifer Brunner (OH, Supreme Court)

Carmen Yulin Cruz (PR-Gov)

Sharice Davids (KS-03)

Kara Eastman (NE-02)

Dr. Kayser Enneking (FL HD-21)

Abby Finkenauer (IA-01)

Sharon Hirsch (TX-66)

Regina Lewis-Ward (GA HD-109)

Christine Marsh (AZ SD-28)

Sarah McBride (DE SD-01)

Gina Ortiz Jones (TX-23)

Danielle Otten (PA HD-155)

Katie Porter (CA-45)

Gabby Salinas (TN HD-97)

Christy Smith (CA-25)

Lauren Underwood (IL-14)

Candace Valenzuela (TX-24)

Celeste Williams (AR-03)

Tricia Zunker (WI-07) Some of them are running for re-election. Some of them are running to flip seats. And all of them are fighting to put power in the hands of the people. **I 'm honored to endorse these terrific candidates who are on the ballot this November, and I'm asking you to join me in fighting by their side.

[How are you planning on getting into this fight? Fill in this quick form to let me know which ways you're most interested in supporting these candidates this year. You'll help shape how our movement takes action.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285257c2/45c30650/1f59a0f99/66e916db/2250700424/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTVExOFBfQU5OX0VORF9FXzIwMjAwNDIyX1YxUzJfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/s/ew-wd-endorsements?source=EMQ18P_ANN_END_E_20200422_V1S2_P&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")**

If we all do our part this year, a new slate of leaders will take office next January. They'll be a breath of fresh air and a burst of energy in the fight to make our economy, our government, and our democracy work for everyone, not just the rich and powerful.

And this November, statewide and state legislative elections will be especially critical as we recover from the coronavirus crisis in the short term and rebuild our economy in the long term.

Together, we can elect Democrats who support bold solutions, rather than temporary fixes and short-term deals -- who will fight for bold reforms to get through this crisis, and who will address the root causes of how we got here.

Now, here's something I've learned about how to make real change: It takes a grassroots movement fighting from the outside -- and leaders fighting from the inside. Today, I'm endorsing leaders who know how to fight and _win_.

[**These candidates will make us proud, but first, they need our help. Please take a moment to fill in this survey and say how you 'll fight to elect Democrats like these in 2020.**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285257c2/45c30650/1f59a0f99/66e916db/2250700424/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTVExOFBfQU5OX0VORF9FXzIwMjAwNDIyX1YxUzJfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/s/ew-wd-endorsements?source=EMQ18P_ANN_END_E_20200422_V1S2_P&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")

Thanks for being a part of this,

Elizabeth
| [**TAKE THE SURVEY**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285257c2/45c30650/1f59a0f99/66e916db/2250700424/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTVExOFBfQU5OX0VORF9FXzIwMjAwNDIyX1YxUzJfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/s/ew-wd-endorsements?source=EMQ18P_ANN_END_E_20200422_V1S2_P&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
