name: Francis Conole
subject: He's got a 31% lifetime score.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Conole for Congress
body:
|
---
[ ](https://conole.bsd.net/page/m/c82b4fa/388db0e9/8d16312/609ba0dc/3231534865/VEsH/?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "https://conoleforcongress.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A%09%09%09%09%09%09%09&utm_campaign=CON_EM_FR_200422_EarthDay_U1_X1&source=CON_EM_FR_200422_EarthDay_U1_X1")

| | Friends. Most of us agree that climate change is one of the biggest threats to our planet. **But my Republican opponent doesn 't agree.** **John Katko has spent his years in Washington voting _against_ key environmental protections while voting _for_ tax breaks for the fossil fuel industry.** We don't need to look any further than Katko's voting record from the League of Conservation Voters to know where he stands: | [](https://conole.bsd.net/page/m/c82b4fa/388db0e9/8d16312/609ba0db/3231534865/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJjb25fbW9udGhseV9hcHIiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoiQ09OX0VNX0ZSXzIwMDQyMl9FYXJ0aERheV9VMV9YMSIsImUzc2dZWE5ySUgxOSI6IjI1In0%3D/?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/con_monthly_apr?refcode=CON_EM_FR_200422_EarthDay_U1_X1&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=2&utm_campaign=CON_EM_FR_200422_EarthDay_U1_X1&source=CON_EM_FR_200422_EarthDay_U1_X1")
---
As a former Pentagon policy advisor, I helped prepare for the devastating effects of climate change at home and abroad. And when I'm your congressman, I'll fight for bold actions, including rejoining the Paris Climate Agreement that Donald Trump foolishly pulled us out of.
**The contrast between my record and John Katko 's record has never been more clear -- especially as we celebrate Earth Day.**
But if we're going to flip one of the last House seats still held by a Republican that Hillary Clinton won in 2016, we're going to need all hands on deck. **[So please, help add a donation to our campaign today if you're ready to send an environmental champion to Congress!](https://conole.bsd.net/page/m/c82b4fa/388db0e9/8d16312/609ba0da/3231534865/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJjb25fbW9udGhseV9hcHIiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoiQ09OX0VNX0ZSXzIwMDQyMl9FYXJ0aERheV9VMV9YMSIsImUzc2dZWE5ySUgxOSI6IjI1In0%3D/?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/con_monthly_apr?refcode=CON_EM_FR_200422_EarthDay_U1_X1&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=3+-+So+please+help+add+a+donation+to+our+cam&utm_campaign=CON_EM_FR_200422_EarthDay_U1_X1&source=CON_EM_FR_200422_EarthDay_U1_X1")**

name: ashby jensen
subject: Recipe Exchange
body:
Hi Friends!

>
> Going back to old times with a recipe exchange! As the world is social distancing right now, many of us are experimenting in our kitchens to help pass the time. So you have been invited to be a part of a Quarantine Cooking recipe exchange!
>
> Please send a recipe to the person whose name is in position #1 (even if you don't know them) and it should be something quick, easy and without rare ingredients. Actually, the best one is the one you know in your head and can type right now. Don't agonize over it... It is the recipe you make when you are short on time (or when you have all the time in the world...#quarantine).
>
> After you've sent your recipe to the person in position #1 below (and only to that person), copy this email into a new email, move my name to the top and put your name in position #2. Only my and your name should show when you send your email. Send to 20 friends via BCC.
>
> If you cannot do this within 5 days, let me know so it will be fair to those participating. You should receive 36 recipes. It's fun to see where they come from! Seldom does anyone drop out because we all need new ideas. The turnaround is fast, as there are only 2 names on the list and you only have to do this once.
>
> In the meantime, stay safe, stay healthy, and STAY HOME.
> Wendie

1\. Erin Howlett
[emh92.mentoria@gmail.com](mailto:emh92.mentoria@gmail.com)
2\. Ashby Jensen
[ashbyjensen@gmail.com](mailto:ashbyjensen@gmail.com)
clean_body: Hi Friends! Going back to old times with a recipe exchange! As the world is social distancing right now, many of us are experimenting in our kitchens to help pass the time. So you have been invited to be a part of a Quarantine Cooking recipe exchange! Please send a recipe to the person whose name is in position #1 (even if you don't know them) and it should be something quick, easy and without rare ingredients. Actually, the best one is the one you know in your head and can type right now. Don't agonize over it... It is the recipe you make when you are short on time (or when you have all the time in the world...#quarantine). After you've sent your recipe to the person in position #1 below (and only to that person), copy this email into a new email, move my name to the top and put your name in position #2. Only my and your name should show when you send your email. Send to 20 friends via BCC. If you cannot do this within 5 days, let me know so it will be fair to those participating. You should receive 36 recipes. It's fun to see where they come from! Seldom does anyone drop out because we all need new ideas. The turnaround is fast, as there are only 2 names on the list and you only have to do this once. In the meantime, stay safe, stay healthy, and STAY HOME. Wendie 1\. Erin Howlett mailto:emh92.mentoria@gmail.com 2\. Ashby Jensen mailto:ashbyjensen@gmail.com

** The Latest on Spicer&Co
------------------------------------------------------------
This past week on Spicer&Co we've had some great segments and guests. We had former Acting Attorney General Matt Whitaker talking about the latest revelations on the abuse of FISA that led to the Mueller investigation. Jordan Belfort and Steve Moore joined us to discuss the economy post-coronavirus and how and when we should open. We were also joined by 2 dairy producers having very different experiences during coronavirus - one can't get enough milk to his customers and another pouring milk out.

Check out those conversations below and catch up on all our segments on my YouTube channel (https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCFEzUWbuym-nBZUSFkvJf4w?utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=69e218f0f0-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_04_21_04_49&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-69e218f0f0-68212193) . Subscribe to to make sure you see all the interviews here (https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCFEzUWbuym-nBZUSFkvJf4w?utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=69e218f0f0-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_04_21_04_49&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-69e218f0f0-68212193) .

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=d3WgSquz8so&utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=69e218f0f0-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_04_21_04_49&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-69e218f0f0-68212193
Former Attorney General Matt Whitaker reacts to 3 big questions:
1. Would the Muller Report have happened without the FISA abuse?
2. Does the FBI owe Carter Page an apology?
3. Should Congress reauthorize FISA?

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=nRFxUbchWcw&t=4s&utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=69e218f0f0-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_04_21_04_49&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-69e218f0f0-68212193
The "Wolf of Wall Street" Jordan Belfort and economist Steve Moore joined us to share their perspective on re-opening the economy post-coronavirus.

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=bCU_PsKYM38&t=3s&utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=69e218f0f0-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_04_21_04_49&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-69e218f0f0-68212193
There's a major disparity in the demand for milk - farms like South Mountain Creamery have a waiting list for customers, but producers like Obert Legacy Dairy that deliver to schools and institutions are having to dump out their milk - they joined us to discuss the problem and possible solutions.

** Is your state switching to vote-by-mail?
------------------------------------------------------------

Is your state changing the way votes are cast? My direct mail firm has a new post on their website explaining all of the possible scenarios and what campaigns and voters should be prepared for.

Read it here (https://point1.gop/is-your-state-changing-the-way-votes-are-cast/?utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=69e218f0f0-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_04_21_04_49&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-69e218f0f0-68212193) .

Thanks,

Sean

name: Claire Chase for Congress
subject: Claire Chase Shames Xochitl Torres Small Into Standing Up For Her Constituents
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Claire Chase for Congress, Inc
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| Hey there,
Xochitl Torres Small finally condemned AOC for celebrating New Mexicans' economic suffering after getting called out by Claire Chase. Claire's not even in Congress yet, but she's already holding far-left Democrats accountable.
Now the only question is: Will Xochitl stab her constituents in the back and endorse Joe Biden, who [promised](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0017i7WfWcmnKlE-hn20cozvQRhWK73FMavnuD4GRIj7JD3t-2Cy5_DTeYfCPWNGyPzV1LwYAjTfp07Rs8CzCmYOIXnsYnzquZTd_MkfZytq9bdJ-1D1BDQUUxqMv19HjxH5C3FbG5tJj7iZ2cIp1wqZRYDGuLVO-pkXTNayfCLyvPSu0oowd1DdHgO19s_ABavPilur7WXptDoFP8LHdj0QDJuSZ8hKPnHvwCaPGmljb2qpE8LDKB9KMg-7CF9KEAt71JM7ihFUNh2DUKlVs4Q5vCZGZ7HifQrXdBQIpz1wiQX18yHDEFznQ==&c=g2KP-mRpnFSlZxh0ioyFIIQWYtRo4wTP9DckPQ4x74yKyYyFfH_wXA==&ch=OGRD6blXYNR-KNTE6x3iVIjQ_016TEdgHhsy7nLCusnsuWfkkB47ig==) to bankrupt New Mexico with an oil & gas drilling ban?
---
| Vulnerable New Mexico Democrat Condemns AOC for Cheering Decline of Oil Prices Washington Free Beacon Colin Anderson [https://freebeacon.com/2020-election/vulnerable-new-mexico-democrat-condemns-aocs-oil-comments/](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0017i7WfWcmnKlE-hn20cozvQRhWK73FMavnuD4GRIj7JD3t-2Cy5_DTeYfCPWNGyPzoeFlJ0QzYJkNI_Dj_8GJbeZg8POLCC7IZH61Af-l1Jq3ioDAMl4-Wpf7NiI7d5V4mWrlETuzImVeA8Ls3vGis0tzDNxESPfhcQzyhyLudcj4qi6StEjIhv5MHuhCqh-LD1m5X8hv3z0KAxPnfld-y9zRuY_50BkmghcrZw3dFZu6PLwco8Iylw==&c=g2KP-mRpnFSlZxh0ioyFIIQWYtRo4wTP9DckPQ4x74yKyYyFfH_wXA==&ch=OGRD6blXYNR-KNTE6x3iVIjQ_016TEdgHhsy7nLCusnsuWfkkB47ig==)

Rep. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez (D., N.Y.) on Tuesday drew fire from a fellow freshman Democrat for cheering on the collapse of oil prices.
Ocasio-Cortez faced criticism Monday for a tweet in which she said "you absolutely love to see" plunging oil prices. Rep. Xochitl Torres Small (D., N.M.), whose district includes the oil-rich Permian Basin, admonished Ocasio-Cortez, accusing her of taking joy in an economic crash that could destroy the livelihoods of thousands of workers.
"A champion for the working class should be a champion for all workers," Torres Small said in a statement Tuesday. "In New Mexico, the working class is, in part, made up of tens of thousands of oil and gas workers who have worked hard every day to power our state and now stand to lose their livelihoods. No person should take joy in their suffering."
The rising prominence of far-left figures like Ocasio-Cortez and the Democratic Party's liberal lurch create challenges for candidates like Torres Small. The New Mexico Democrat was narrowly elected in 2018 as a moderate in a conservative district after GOP incumbent Steve Pearce opted to run for governor.
Claire Chase, a former energy sector worker and one of three candidates for the GOP nomination, said Torres Small's criticism means little if she continues to toe a party line that is hostile to oil and gas workers.
"I'm glad we were finally able to shame Xochitl Torres Small into offering an ounce of criticism for her radical party," Chase told the Washington Free Beacon. "Unfortunately, this muted criticism will be meaningless when Xochitl eventually endorses Joe Biden, who has vowed to ban oil drilling and bankrupt our state."
Chase had called on Torres Small to condemn Ocasio-Cortez's remarks Monday. She pointed to "over 100,000 New Mexico jobs" threatened by the dramatic drop in oil prices, which fell into negative territory for the first time in history. Following the bipartisan criticism, Ocasio-Cortez deleted her tweet celebrating the tumble, replacing it with a new tweet touting her [$94 trillion](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0017i7WfWcmnKlE-hn20cozvQRhWK73FMavnuD4GRIj7JD3t-2Cy5_DTeYfCPWNGyPz10ksV1XpvlYFfxeJHiX7q3QrsTjxYMLvv4tS3w_jEXQxg8oH0dL8f-L4_Q27WjdcnNiOc3VLJo_rmQbdPE4cfJBwXC-bd0Ev2_tgUnOJOl-bwqDdgLwLPA8Jpab0OlWMxbIJtyaW1hUE5kmjD521fFqWQ-OFsaOz&c=g2KP-mRpnFSlZxh0ioyFIIQWYtRo4wTP9DckPQ4x74yKyYyFfH_wXA==&ch=OGRD6blXYNR-KNTE6x3iVIjQ_016TEdgHhsy7nLCusnsuWfkkB47ig==) Green New Deal.
"Now is the time to create millions of good jobs building out the infrastructure and clean energy necessary to save our planet for future generations," Ocasio-Cortez said. "For our economy, our planet, and our future, we need a Green New Deal."
Increased animosity from progressives toward the American oil industry could spell trouble for Democrats pitching themselves as moderates to swing-state voters. Biden in March said he would prevent oil companies from drilling as part of his effort to fight climate change following pressure from socialist senator Bernie Sanders (I., Vt.). The Biden campaign walked back the controversial statement by saying Biden had "misspoken."
Chase, the former chair of the New Mexico Oil and Gas Association, will face former state legislator Yvette Herrell and businessman Chris Mathys in the district's Republican primary in June. clean_body: | | | | | | | Hey there, Xochitl Torres Small finally condemned AOC for celebrating New Mexicans' economic suffering after getting called out by Claire Chase. Claire's not even in Congress yet, but she's already holding far-left Democrats accountable. Now the only question is: Will Xochitl stab her constituents in the back and endorse Joe Biden, who == to bankrupt New Mexico with an oil & gas drilling ban? | Vulnerable New Mexico Democrat Condemns AOC for Cheering Decline of Oil Prices Washington Free Beacon Colin Anderson == Rep. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez (D., N.Y.) on Tuesday drew fire from a fellow freshman Democrat for cheering on the collapse of oil prices. Ocasio-Cortez faced criticism Monday for a tweet in which she said "you absolutely love to see" plunging oil prices. Rep. Xochitl Torres Small (D., N.M.), whose district includes the oil-rich Permian Basin, admonished Ocasio-Cortez, accusing her of taking joy in an economic crash that could destroy the livelihoods of thousands of workers. "A champion for the working class should be a champion for all workers," Torres Small said in a statement Tuesday. "In New Mexico, the working class is, in part, made up of tens of thousands of oil and gas workers who have worked hard every day to power our state and now stand to lose their livelihoods. No person should take joy in their suffering." The rising prominence of far-left figures like Ocasio-Cortez and the Democratic Party's liberal lurch create challenges for candidates like Torres Small. The New Mexico Democrat was narrowly elected in 2018 as a moderate in a conservative district after GOP incumbent Steve Pearce opted to run for governor. Claire Chase, a former energy sector worker and one of three candidates for the GOP nomination, said Torres Small's criticism means little if she continues to toe a party line that is hostile to oil and gas workers. "I'm glad we were finally able to shame Xochitl Torres Small into offering an ounce of criticism for her radical party," Chase told the Washington Free Beacon. "Unfortunately, this muted criticism will be meaningless when Xochitl eventually endorses Joe Biden, who has vowed to ban oil drilling and bankrupt our state." Chase had called on Torres Small to condemn Ocasio-Cortez's remarks Monday. She pointed to "over 100,000 New Mexico jobs" threatened by the dramatic drop in oil prices, which fell into negative territory for the first time in history. Following the bipartisan criticism, Ocasio-Cortez deleted her tweet celebrating the tumble, replacing it with a new tweet touting her == Green New Deal. "Now is the time to create millions of good jobs building out the infrastructure and clean energy necessary to save our planet for future generations," Ocasio-Cortez said. "For our economy, our planet, and our future, we need a Green New Deal." Increased animosity from progressives toward the American oil industry could spell trouble for Democrats pitching themselves as moderates to swing-state voters. Biden in March said he would prevent oil companies from drilling as part of his effort to fight climate change following pressure from socialist senator Bernie Sanders (I., Vt.). The Biden campaign walked back the controversial statement by saying Biden had "misspoken." Chase, the former chair of the New Mexico Oil and Gas Association, will face former state legislator Yvette Herrell and businessman Chris Mathys in the district's Republican primary in June. She has == Herrell, who fell to Torres Small by less than 2 points in 2018, by more than $300,000. Torres Small did not draw a primary opponent. Ocasio-Cortez did not respond to request for comment. | ### | == | | | Paid for by Claire Chase for Congress, Inc. | | Claire Chase for Congress | PO Box 8010, Roswell, NM 88202 | | Sent by mailto:mike@clairechase.org

subject: They are coming for me
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MATT GAETZ
body:
---
| | | | | | [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001CzmiOk6w4YIi8oX-dZE4Nq8fGVp4ThZJ_iUFyC8QqXXtc60YVLS9NYMZSZE_LNOhyZhVS6OOF3NfFS1nErnrdjFZ7tqDSQcNhenaQfcGHzC4COGDu9_lWWStv8Z9LdArcYN_15NRdTt35gxcWNVnmmF6-h5S_O7J0grp2r0981s=&c=Lajp7ltRTv_LO-g0y4qhtDZ35mfxlklbWpI5YSTXgMXOtlzQHRL0pA==&ch=bACB13mCSJwGVp2s4cb2BvGZ1x9buh3UpoteMJy0ogO_j_EFh2fhiQ==)
---
| Patriot,
I have become a dangerous voice in Washington, D.C. Standing by President Trump, I have vowed to drain the swamp, take on special interests, and fight against corruption and greed in American politics.
Most recently, I have been outspoken about Sen. Richard Burr's stock sell-off before the coronavirus lockdown that crippled the economy. The swamp and the deep state are worried because I'm calling out a member of my own party, as anyone should do when they see corruption taking place.
The latest attempt to silence me is a "hit piece" from Politico (which was probably written in exchange for some other intel story from Sen. Burr's camp). It is filled with weak allegations, but it proves that the swamp is trying to shut me up.
I'm really going to need the support of you, the American people, as I take on the swamp and the deep state, who see me as the biggest threat to their greed, corruption, and power.
They can try to smear me all they want, but will never get rid of me if I have your support.
The "ruling class" in Washington are all-in to silence me, but I won't stop fighting for the interests of the people. Ever since I renounced all federal PAC money, I've had a growing target on my back. As the swamp ramps up their attacks on me, I really need you to [stand by me. ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001CzmiOk6w4YIi8oX-dZE4Nq8fGVp4ThZJ_iUFyC8QqXXtc60YVLS9NYMZSZE_LNOhyZhVS6OOF3NfFS1nErnrdjFZ7tqDSQcNhenaQfcGHzC4COGDu9_lWWStv8Z9LdArcYN_15NRdTt35gxcWNVnmmF6-h5S_O7J0grp2r0981s=&c=Lajp7ltRTv_LO-g0y4qhtDZ35mfxlklbWpI5YSTXgMXOtlzQHRL0pA==&ch=bACB13mCSJwGVp2s4cb2BvGZ1x9buh3UpoteMJy0ogO_j_EFh2fhiQ==)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Dani=20Brzozowski?=
subject: Earth Day 🌎
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dani for Illinois
body:
Earth Day serves as a reminder that we must find creative, sustainable solutions to climate change. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/424be4d0fc75/earth-day?e=140a9b81e7)
---
| |
---
| |
#
Today marks the 50th anniversary of Earth Day.

Being a good steward of the earth and taking care of our environment has always been important to me. From [winning an Earth Day essay contest in 3rd grade](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=14ab74ff92&e=140a9b81e7) for writing that we have only one world and a shared responsibility to look after it, to [standing up to the sand miners and fracking in my community](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=f01d9d8764&e=140a9b81e7), I have always recognized the urgent need we have to protect and care for our planet.

Sadly, too many members of Congress do not understand this. Rising sea levels, record flooding that has devastated our homes and our farms, and the frequent extreme weather conditions we see are all happening because **Congress is filled with folks like Adam Kinzinger who do the bidding of fossil fuel companies. **

Protecting our planet will be a priority for me in Congress, [can you make a contribution to our campaign to help us win in November?](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=b29517fa62&e=140a9b81e7)

You can count on me to fight for a Green New Deal that will help us fight back against the devastating impacts of climate change. I said it when I was in 3rd grade and it rings just as true now: **we have this one planet, this one chance, and the responsibility is on all of us to recognize how precious that is.**

Congressman Kinzinger can keep the dark money he gets from fossil fuel companies. I don't need it and I don't want it. I've got _you._

Dani Brzozowski
Democratic Nominee for Congress, IL-16
---

subject: Wine Wednesdays🍷
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Matt Mayberry for Congress
body:
| |
---
| [View in browser](https://click.ml.mailersend.com/link/c/YT0xNDA1MjMyODgzNzU2NDM4ODU4JmM9czZrMSZlPTE5MjgmYj0zNDA0MjM4MjYmZD1xN3ozdjh6.CZ-6rrSDbg8Z1rnjlmar-_JWaM8drHHGEC0Jo81pZ6c)
| | | | [ ](https://click.ml.mailersend.com/link/c/YT0xNDA1MjMyODgzNzU2NDM4ODU4JmM9czZrMSZlPTE5MjgmYj0zNDA0MjM4MjgmZD1qMHQ2aDJr.TcCdKSNLZF_zQDcTiiOoocaVwAT9rZIHPyIu7fGGpTc)
---

| Derek I knew you'd open up this email.
# 😃
I want to share a new fundraising effort that our campaign is doing that I think you'll appreciate. I’m pretty excited by it myself!! I am thrilled to highlight and showcase all the great small businesses here in New Hampshire’s First Congressional District. There are some fantastic New Hampshire wines and there's a growing market for it. I want to share some with you![

For a $100 donation to our campaign I'm going to buy you a bottle of wine as a token of my appreciation](https://click.ml.mailersend.com/link/c/YT0xNDA1MjMyODgzNzU2NDM4ODU4JmM9czZrMSZlPTE5MjgmYj0zNDA0MjM4MzAmZD1xMmUxaDF6.3WQi46XoAkrAdcCJKuHOMogzKzf5slh1FtXjxQ92eB0). It will also be delivered to your home! No need to change out of pajamas, just grab a corkscrew.

In the last fundraising quarter, our campaign raised more money and from more New Hampshire donors than either of my opponents. Congressman Chris Pappas is raising his money from liberal socialist groups and not from the Granite State. Another opponent only had 25 donors from New Hampshire, we had 338. We are proud of New Hampshire and our supporters!

Our campaign is New Hampshire based and New Hampshire powered, I want to buy you a bottle of wine from one of our great New Hampshire vineyards and wineries. [So how about it - donate $100 and we will get you a bottle?](https://click.ml.mailersend.com/link/c/YT0xNDA1MjMyODgzNzU2NDM4ODU4JmM9czZrMSZlPTE5MjgmYj0zNDA0MjM4MzImZD1rN3A1eTh6.XXGu-7ZplZPK26pd6nJb4NhS-HzMz2z6gQ1ibJWnM0g)

Got a beer drinker in the family? No worries, that promotional effort is coming soon!!

Thank you again for your support, it's greatly, and personally, appreciated.

Cheers!
-Matt Mayberry
___

Cheers! -Matt Mayberry _ | | | | | | | Paid For By Matt Mayberry for Congress | | | Matt Mayberry for Congress | | P.O. Box 1776, Dover NH 03821 United States | | | ---|---|---

name: Barack Obama
subject: I’m asking, Derek
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, [www
body:
Our candidates will need the full backing of a strong Democratic Party -- and that won’t happen overnight. | |
---
Derek,
**We’re 195 days out from the most important election of our lifetimes, so I’m asking you to join me in committing to party unity.** Our country’s future hangs on this election. Our chance at putting a Democrat in the White House, flipping the Senate, and expanding our House majority all depends on having the necessary resources to win. **That’s why I launched the Democratic Unity Fund in partnership with the DNC.** Our candidates will need the full backing of a strong Democratic Party this year -- and that simply can’t happen overnight. The DNC is already hiring and training organizers and upgrading their tech and data infrastructure, but that work must be expanded to build the kind of operation our candidates need to win. **Derek, will you join me by making your first $7 donation directly to the fund today? Joe Biden, who I've proudly endorsed for president of the United States, and Democrats nationwide are counting on early investment from strong supporters like you.**

name: Chris Jacobs
subject: Important Voter Reminder!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JACOBS FOR CONGRESS [Unsubscribe](http://sendy
body:
|
---
Dear Friend, Have you requested your absentee ballot yet? Due to COVID 19 all New Yorker's are allowed to vote by absentee ballot and I want to make sure all of my supporters have the opportunity to request one. It is imperative that we send strong conservative leadership to Washington on June 23rd. Nancy Pelosi and the Democrats have been holding up critical legislation to support the American people. President Trump endorsed me because he knows I'm ready to fight to put Western New York and America First, and get the job done. I'll fight alongside him to defeat COVID-19 and the challenges it has created. That all starts on June 23rd. If you would like to receive an absentee ballot application [click here](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/OAst8O6Rl3q4KZFnr763R83g/mk3FIQLOMJL70erwpVl7Tg/uhGVIdT892eggpZm2yehIWcQ). My campaign will reach out and get you the necessary application so you can receive your ballot. [](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/OAst8O6Rl3q4KZFnr763R83g/BPx763B2ck8nyowuqhxWeNQQ/uhGVIdT892eggpZm2yehIWcQ) If you have any other questions please reach out to my campaign at [info@jacobs4congress.com](mailto:info@jacobs4congress.com) and I will keep you up to date with any election developments and changes. Thank you for your continued support and stay safe. Sincerely, Chris Jacobs

---

| | Peter --

The ability to vote is one of our most fundamental rights as Americans -- but time and again, there are attempts to make voting even harder for certain folks. **It's unacceptable.**

Right here in our district, in-person voting centers are opening up in some parts of the 25th but not others -- and it's mostly along demographic lines. There are no voting centers in the farthest parts of East Palmdale, which is majority Latinx, nor in East Lancaster, with a large African American community.

And Republicans are trying to sabotage vote-by-mail which would keep voters safe during this time. Trump has complained about it from his daily briefings, while claiming it's ok if _he_ votes by mail. And Republicans' refusal to bail out the post office would make voting by mail nearly impossible in November.

**[We are fighting tooth and nail alongside the Voter Protection Project to prevent voter suppression in every form. Can you help by chipping in a donation to split between our campaign and the VPP?](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb74/29776869/a262ce2/569f5557/682163988/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA0MjJfdnBwdGFuZGVtLWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2004_email_christysmith_vpptandem?refcode=em20_200422_vpptandem-full")** [DONATE NOW](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb74/29776869/a262ce2/569f5557/682163988/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA0MjJfdnBwdGFuZGVtLWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2004_email_christysmith_vpptandem?refcode=em20_200422_vpptandem-full") Voting is one of our most important rights, and anyone threatening to take it away is fundamentally wrong.

And for political parties to try to rig the system -- so that people who won't vote for them simply can't vote -- is corruption at its finest.

**[It's time to fight back. If you can right now, can you split a donation between the Voter Protection Project and our campaign?](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb74/29776869/a262ce2/569f5557/682163988/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA0MjJfdnBwdGFuZGVtLWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2004_email_christysmith_vpptandem?refcode=em20_200422_vpptandem-full")**

Thanks so much,

\-- Team Christy [DONATE](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb74/29776869/a262ce2/569f5557/682163988/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA0MjJfdnBwdGFuZGVtLWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2004_email_christysmith_vpptandem?refcode=em20_200422_vpptandem-full")
_The number one priority during this time is to make sure everyone helps mitigate the spread of COVID-19 in California and across the country. Our campaign is doing our part by canceling all in-person events, moving to a digital operation, and supporting local efforts to help those in need. Emails like this are a critical part of our ability to run a strong campaign that can win._ |
---|---|---

name: Michelle De La Isla
subject: Stand with the U.S. Postal Service
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MICHELLE FOR KANSAS
body:
If we don't act to provide relief to the USPS, millions of Americans will be left without jobs or access to the supplies they need.
_Mayor De La Isla’s number one priority during this crisis is to slow the spread of COVID-19 in Kansas. In accordance with CDC guidelines, our campaign has canceled all in-person events, but we will continue engaging with voters and supporters online through email and social media. Thank you for reading and continuing to be part of our team._

Friends,

Across our country, postal workers are working hard to ensure that all of us receive our mail and packages throughout this crisis. These brave men and women of the USPS, many of whom we know as our friends, family, or just the friendly face you see delivering your mail or essential items like medication, emergency supplies, and information about local and primary elections, have stepped up during this pandemic -- just like they've done time and time again.

**Now we need to step up for them.** Between the partisan politics in Washington and this nationwide pandemic, the U.S. Postal Service has been hit hard. Mail volume has dropped and the USPS is on track to run out of money in a matter of months. So far, the federal government has not provided any financial relief.

**[Now more than ever, we need to show USPS workers we have their backs. Add your name now to stand with the USPS workers putting themselves at risk during this crisis.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17232523/187323749/371998266?gpsid=8_122_12507&ms=em20_200422_usps_adv_gq_ful__tm_ettx&refcode=em20_200422_usps_adv_gq_ful__tm_ettx&utm_campaign=em20_200422_usps_adv_gq_ful__tm_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=mdli&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTUzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZGNkMjI0MS1mYjg0LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5_K8MXCU1G9byKOkBIayAyik_EqMEJ-1Di4V3PybOl4=&emci=1bc41fbe-d884-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=bdcd2241-fb84-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=9593007)**

If we don't act to provide relief to the USPS, millions of Americans will be left without jobs or access to the supplies they need. We need to send a message to Congress that rural communities, like those in Kansas, are standing with the USPS and the essential service it provides.

**[If you're with us, add your name to show your support for the U.S. Postal Service.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17232524/187323750/371998266?gpsid=8_122_12507&ms=em20_200422_usps_adv_gq_ful__tm_ettx&refcode=em20_200422_usps_adv_gq_ful__tm_ettx&utm_campaign=em20_200422_usps_adv_gq_ful__tm_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=mdli&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTUzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZGNkMjI0MS1mYjg0LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5_K8MXCU1G9byKOkBIayAyik_EqMEJ-1Di4V3PybOl4=&emci=1bc41fbe-d884-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=bdcd2241-fb84-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=9593007)**

Thank you, and stay safe.

Michelle

**Michelle De La Isla is running for Congress to fight for families across KS-02. We understand that you may have other financial priorities during this challenging time. While we would greatly appreciate your support, please only contribute what you can.**

Friend, today marks 50 years of fighting for a sustainable future — of rallying for environmental justice, pushing politicians to listen to the science, and challenging corporate greed and pollution.

As we celebrate the 50th Earth Day, we’re looking 50 years into the future. **What will Earth look like in 2070?** The actions we take today by working together — or fail to take — will determine whether we will continue to recognize the planet we were born into and whether future generations will inherit a livable, sustainable future or not.

[_**If you’re ready for immediate climate action, pledge to be a 2020 climate voter today — we need everyone to come together this November to lay the foundation for meaningful progress for the next 50 years.
**_](http://clicks.tomsteyer.com/ls/click?upn=2PbTaIH-2Bu1BICxGw6BOoZgtEWFVxoUaG7cQrRAp6kOu6zDdk8lZX9oLS-2FzRuoPozt-2Fb7EwdjcjHGIT9KxOFJ2NNodM-2B8n-2FsrWyPj-2F0HJSNt1ILFUlkvzYi1rEBZssBt83x69Mrw-2F-2FGXUZY4RyS0EIFMQEMXxHT6Tvzi1Ia-2FSoRAJVuUlOwByvB-2B9lWw6vfph3O6N3Tw-2Fs7-2Be-2BtvceeH-2Fk1U-2BF7yxyS6nT8h8YIsX9R9Y32EgkVrwujjkCzakLMCHs4veWxf-2F9cbz-2Bl04X8Uxdw-3D-3DrJ7Q_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymj-2F7ZKPx3NVKw8kjoD6Gq3c-2BrItP5taLUBrsAr-2FjZetFIJTu2XOSYWw-2BRTsCZVEZUmXdgh-2BenInj6gTOMryUZZwt3RypvgUvWFALdnuz-2FK7TNQhrxAPmyu44ASG0CSb0zK2-2BLJoJ-2Fwy7zp2dpS4xgRI8hnMoy6U-2BcqGf5GJvx5akQ8FbTmIsnwSiDkkGZL-2FTHXDBiXi7-2FA4qN9tgVt7Da7HN7pBIBQ-2BXADVL8uQRm2ermeMcnCfMY1eWBrtK9Ax3YG3KVB62fGKDKHaS-2FOuGnUA7naFj2OylxEXBu-2B8cJrdwNnzItP-2BfYoOdjX-2FnoeB5c2PLoc8AKpi2c96N1pd4SaaQ25s-2FzcA2CgTLOxZyOrshxYDhEub8jfkxJBIP-2BbX0UV22yb68TkBDVnlA0sKvrE3ndaVT2iEyCgnbr9duF5-2BFPkVmsg8rkdvvYcGZ88sB34hxDpLN-2FdNPsrYtMD41mcjRzW03l01dpeg2zfYm9JA1qq9amlhefAsy3q3uE51CQUuwmroUR2F5ZIijeFTWxBF6CP9PYmGyLuiOVsxU-2BBpMBEyVtFI19tbUUuOKvQw3Dk9o7RGACt495Lb3R5Qu7Z8SK3XrCJO81dRc8tWc9xmafMn4t1qjhdI2h9B5Zgi-2BPY0rTbXt-2BOHcNcNVxqKNIpbMKMVEg8kdpaUvh8wztUliwSzeY4u6QFUgVl7wnZ5GDgtalAwlo1U-2B5IrERnCYMXwlGobDVN3u0sZZ2khQ7ssowa28dDmZH5m-2F1-2BuoR-2FpdaU-3D)

clean_body: | | | | Friend, today marks 50 years of fighting for a sustainable future — of rallying for environmental justice, pushing politicians to listen to the science, and challenging corporate greed and pollution. As we celebrate the 50th Earth Day, we’re looking 50 years into the future. What will Earth look like in 2070? The actions we take today by working together — or fail to take — will determine whether we will continue to recognize the planet we were born into and whether future generations will inherit a livable, sustainable future or not. body:
This was just reported and it changes everything!

| Peter -- We literally gasped at this news:

[**_FOX News just reported that their polls show Biden is beating Trump in swing-state Pennsylvania!_**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/17232601/187326083/-1924412461?refcode=VC_UD_20200422_EMDF_E2_Fox-Poll_T0-S0SL0C0_AC&amount=10&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjY2ODgzNDMzLWZlODQtZWExMS1hOTRjLTAwMTU1ZDAzYjFlOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=aiVN_OaAINVMQcJ3pmyGtVudPJQKvSopZeOOL_opicw=) | [Fox News Poll | April 18 - 21, 2020](https://click.everyaction.com/k/17232602/187326084/-1924412461?refcode=VC_UD_20200422_EMDF_E2_Fox-Poll_T0-S0SL0C0_AC&amount=10&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjY2ODgzNDMzLWZlODQtZWExMS1hOTRjLTAwMTU1ZDAzYjFlOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=aiVN_OaAINVMQcJ3pmyGtVudPJQKvSopZeOOL_opicw=)
**Joseph R. Biden: 50% ↑↑
Donald J. Trump: 42% ↓↓**
---
But Peter, we can't let this blind us with confidence. We'll explain why:

In 2016, almost every single poll predicted that Trump would lose big time in swing states, including Pennsylvania. But then, out of nowhere, Democrats were BLINDSIDED. **Trump actually won Pennsylvania's popular vote by _less than 1%_ , but he still took ALL of their Electoral College votes.** Experts like Nate Silver say that this massive upset essentially handed him the entire election on a silver platter.

The only way we'll ensure a victory this time is if we make sure that swing-voters know what a massive FAILURE Trump is.

[**Our organization is creating highly effective ads to make sure voters in swing-states vote for Democrats and kick Trump to the curb. But we need another $1,730 before tomorrow or our ads might never see the light of day. If just [4] good Democrats in PA donate, we know we can reach it. name: =?utf-8?Q?Janet=20Barresi?=
subject: Pelosi and the far-left Democrats blocked crucial small business funding
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JANET BARRESI FOR CONGRESS
body:
We need to send a small business champion to Washington | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/3512390ffa47/calling-all-patriots-12405606?e=795c6d9796)
---
| | Peter,

I ran a small business for over 40 years.

I can tell you from experience—**it is not always easy.**

As a matter of fact, there are times when it can feel downright overwhelming. The stress of wondering if you'll have enough business that particular week to make ends meet, if your profits are exceeding your expenses, if you can pay your employees a comfortable wage. **It's tough.

And all of this is _before_ the uncertainty of a national pandemic.**

What our small businesses need right now is financial relief. When a restaurant can't have customers, then there is no profit, and when there is no profit, then there can be no wages paid. Bankruptcy. Unemployment. Life is turned completely upside down.

It then falls on Congress to take care of our small business owners through loans and protection plans. Which is why it's so sickening that Nancy Pelosi, Kendra Horn and the rest of the far-left Democrats decided to block the funding to the crucial Paycheck Protection Program because of partisan politics.

Has it gone this far?

Is nothing above playing partisan politics? If the Democrats can't come to the table on saving the lives of these small businesses, then what can we come together on?

[Please donate $25, $50, $100, $250, or $500 to bring a conservative champion for small businesses to Washington. Every dollar you give goes towards fighting for our small business owners.](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=bf081f4249&e=795c6d9796)

The House will have another opportunity to vote on the bill tomorrow. Kendra Horn voted against it the first time around. Has she had enough? Will she finally quit playing politics and vote to fund the PPP?

You shouldn't have to wonder. You deserve a voice in Washington that knows the struggle of running a small business. You deserve a small business champion.

I will be that voice for you.

Let's send Kendra Horn home in November. [Chip in $25, $50, $100, $250, or even $500 and let's send a small business champion to Washington.](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=74b4cbf059&e=795c6d9796)
Best,
Janet Barresi
---
| | _Copyright © 2020 Janet for Congress, All rights reserved._
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
Janet for CongressPO Box 20147Oklahoma City, OK 73156-0147
[Add us to your address book](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/vcard?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=54eeb9df14)

Want to change how you receive these emails?

name: Team Tina
subject: busier than ever
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
|
#
Hello, Families across the nation are facing immeasurable hardships right now. On top of trying to stay safe and healthy, too many are also struggling to put food on the table. Second Harvest Heartland Food Bank is working around the clock to make sure folks have the resources they need. But they are busier than ever trying to meet the growing needs of our communities. As they adapt to more demand, higher food prices, and restraints on how many volunteers can be working at once as they work to combat hunger, they need all the help they can get. **With your support, we’ve already raised thousands of dollars to support organizations like Second Harvest Heartland — and now, we’re SO close to hitting the $50,000 mark to help them continue their important work.** So, we are asking you to help us keep up the momentum and donate directly to the people who need it most: **[If you are financially able, will you add a donation to Second Harvest Heartland Food Bank and help them keep our communities fed during this crisis? Thank you in advance.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17232653/187331626/-502848888?refcode=em200422-secondharvest&amounts=10,25,50,100,150,250,1000&firstname=&lastname=&email=&addr1=&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMTZmNjY5My0wMDg1LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=58Av_sWx6qHLRSM4b2RRVqjb8_3qKbqest-RltuMoAo=)** | [Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17232654/187331627/-502848888?refcode=em200422-secondharvest&amounts=10,25,50,100,150,250,1000&firstname=&lastname=&email=&addr1=&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMTZmNjY5My0wMDg1LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=58Av_sWx6qHLRSM4b2RRVqjb8_3qKbqest-RltuMoAo=)

clean_body: | Hello, Families across the nation are facing immeasurable hardships right now. On top of trying to stay safe and healthy, too many are also struggling to put food on the table. Second Harvest Heartland Food Bank is working around the clock to make sure folks have the resources they need. But they are busier than ever trying to meet the growing needs of our communities. As they adapt to more demand, higher food prices, and restraints on how many volunteers can be working at once as they work to combat hunger, they need all the help they can get. With your support, we’ve already raised thousands of dollars to support organizations like Second Harvest Heartland — and now, we’re SO close to hitting the $50,000 mark to help them continue their important work. So, we are asking you to help us keep up the momentum and donate directly to the people who need it most: = | = Hunger doesn’t take a break during this crisis, which means every dollar you can spare will make a difference. Thank you, as always, for your support. — Team Tina Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota Tina Smith for Minnesota PO Box 14362 St. Paul, MN 55114 United States Contributions or gifts to Tina Smith for Minnesota are not tax-deductible.

body:

We know that right now many people are facing financial hardships, so if you cannot afford to give today -- that 's okay. We appreciate you opening and reading our campaign updates. If you would like to turn off these emails for a bit, then you can do so [here](https://act.myngp.com/el/YZ3LF7ROZZvkinuxkj2rCUNULtwG3-adJ93bIcNDKpE=/clNImp_F_raBeOv-BOTOO4zohfX1hmeSySQ1YZ4e93o=)._
* * *
Happy Earth Day from Team Hart!
Take Our Earth Day Poll: **[Do you agree that we need climate action?](https://act.myngp.com/el/YZ3LF7ROZZvkinuxkj2rCUNULtwG3-adJ93bIcNDKpE=/xakY55tnwjXPw2W2GcXlymqHHSTneOI4b_r_08qZPO8=?refcode=200422-email)** Today is Earth Day, and it's a good time to reflect on how we need to prepare for the challenge of climate change before it's too late. We believe Iowa farmers and Iowa workers can lead in addressing climate change. We should be supporting best practices and investing in new technologies. We can mitigate the extreme weather events and provide opportunities for entrepreneurs and workers. We also believe that we need to take action now before climate change gets any worse. Our children and grandchildren are counting on us. **[We want to hear from you. Do you agree that we need to take action on climate change now?](https://act.myngp.com/el/YZ3LF7ROZZvkinuxkj2rCUNULtwG3-adJ93bIcNDKpE=/xakY55tnwjXPw2W2GcXlymqHHSTneOI4b_r_08qZPO8=?refcode=200422-email)** | [YES](https://act.myngp.com/el/YZ3LF7ROZZvkinuxkj2rCUNULtwG3-adJ93bIcNDKpE=/xakY55tnwjXPw2W2GcXlymqHHSTneOI4b_r_08qZPO8=?refcode=200422-email) | [NO](https://act.myngp.com/el/YZ3LF7ROZZvkinuxkj2rCUNULtwG3-adJ93bIcNDKpE=/xakY55tnwjXPw2W2GcXlymqHHSTneOI4b_r_08qZPO8=?refcode=200422-email)

Team Hart

name: Team Inslee
subject: Our legacy
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
body:
This Earth Day, we must listen to the science.
| **Team Inslee** Friend, On the first Earth Day in 1970, millions of Americans came together under one common mission: to protect our planet and our collective future. Fifty years have passed, and while we can't come together this Earth Day, it's an important reminder that defeating the climate crisis has never been more urgent -- even as we remain steadfast in our fight against COVID-19. In fact, if there's anything we've learned during this pandemic, it's the importance of listening to scientists, whether they're climatologists or epidemiologists. We know that the decisions we make about our future must be firmly grounded in reason and science. And the science is clear: We must embrace a 100% clean energy future to defeat the climate crisis. That's why we are lifting up Earth Day Northwest's work and sharing Jay's commitment this Earth Day: to leave the Earth as a legacy, and not a burden, for future generations. For Jay, that includes his four grandkids: Chase, Zoe, Brody, and Annie. **[](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8577?t=3&akid=8052%2E868730%2EnFApM1)****[If you feel the same, we hope you'll share Jay's commitment with your friends and family on Facebook right now.](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8577?t=4&akid=8052%2E868730%2EnFApM1)** We're glad to be with you in this fight, Team Inslee | [SHARE](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8577?t=5&akid=8052%2E868730%2EnFApM1)
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](http://act.jayinslee.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=6&akid=8052%2E868730%2EnFApM1). Contributions or gifts to JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D) are not tax deductible. | PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)

name: Powered By People (BetoORourke.com)
subject: No one should go hungry because they’re unemployed from COVID-19.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR AMERICA
body:
[1]Powered By People

Last night
the Powered by People volunteer team made 2,000 calls to help food banks.
That’s amazing – but the truth is we have a lot more work to do to hit our
goal.

Hungry people are counting on us. At some recent food drop-offs, hundreds
of cars have been lined up, filled with our fellow Americans who are
struggling during this crisis.

No one should go hungry because they’re unemployed due to COVID-19. If you
agree, we need your help.

Can you help us meet our goal of making 3,000 phone calls to help food
banks feed the hungry? RSVP for Thursday’s virtual phone bank with Beto.
It doesn’t matter where you live – you can participate from anywhere.

Upcoming events:

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/event/phone-food-banks/34361/signup/?source=ema20200422-86407&t=1001&akid=86407%2E444211%2Eak15oL ]Thursday: Virtual Phone Bank with Beto
[ https://act.betoorourke.com/event/phone-food-banks/34361/signup/?source=ema20200422-86407&t=1002&akid=86407%2E444211%2Eak15oL ]Thursday, April 23, 6:30 PM CT

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/event/phone-food-banks/34361/signup/?source=ema20200422-86407&t=1003&akid=86407%2E444211%2Eak15oL ]Get more info or RSVP »

Our goal is ambitious, but tomorrow, we don’t want to fall short. This
team has risen to many challenges so far. We can do this!

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/42449?refcode=ema20200422-86407&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1004&akid=86407%2E444211%2Eak15oL ]If you can’t volunteer, please split a donation across 21 food banks
right now. Food banks are in dire need of financial resources to purchase
enough food for their region.

Thank you,

The Powered by People team

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/42449?refcode=ema20200422-86407&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1005&akid=86407%2E444211%2Eak15oL ]Contribute

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1006&akid=86407%2E444211%2Eak15oL

name: Warren Alert (via Team Christy)
subject: We just got a big boost of support in this race >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress
body:
| []()
---

| | Peter --

We're so honored to announce that **Senator Elizabeth Warren just endorsed Christy!**

| [](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb71/29776869/a26df54/569f558c/599992031/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA0MjJfV2FycmVuZW5kby1zMyJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2004_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200422_Warrenendo-s3")
---

**[Can you join Elizabeth Warren in supporting Christy Smith by making a contribution to her campaign today? Our election is rapidly approaching, and we need all of the support we can get.](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb71/29776869/a26df54/569f558c/599992031/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA0MjJfV2FycmVuZW5kby1zMyJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2004_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200422_Warrenendo-s3")**
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
[Express Donate $5](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb71/29776869/a26df54/569f558d/599992031/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA0MjJfV2FycmVuZW5kby1zMyJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2004_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200422_Warrenendo-s3&express_lane=true&amount=5") | [Express Donate $25](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb71/29776869/a26df54/569f558e/599992031/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA0MjJfV2FycmVuZW5kby1zMyJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2004_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200422_Warrenendo-s3&express_lane=true&amount=25")
---|---
[Express Donate $50](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb71/29776869/a26df54/569f558f/599992031/VEsD/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA0MjJfV2FycmVuZW5kby1zMyJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2004_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200422_Warrenendo-s3&express_lane=true&amount=50") | [Express Donate $100](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb71/29776869/a26df54/569f5588/599992031/VEsA/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA0MjJfV2FycmVuZW5kby1zMyJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2004_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200422_Warrenendo-s3&express_lane=true&amount=100")
[Express Donate $250](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb71/29776869/a26df54/569f5589/599992031/VEsB/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA0MjJfV2FycmVuZW5kby1zMyJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2004_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200422_Warrenendo-s3&express_lane=true&amount=250") | [Donate Other Amount](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb71/29776869/a26df54/569f558c/599992031/VEsO/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA0MjJfV2FycmVuZW5kby1zMyJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2004_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200422_Warrenendo-s3")
Here's what Senator Warren had to say:

> "I am proud to endorse Christy Smith because whether it was serving on the local PTA, school board, or in the state house, Christy has always stepped up.
>
> By swearing to never take a dime from a Corporate PAC or D.C. lobbyist, I know she will fight for her constituents, and her constituents alone.
>
> Now more than ever, we need fighters like Christy in Congress working to lower the cost of prescription drugs, make healthcare more affordable, provide American workers access to paid sick leave, and ensure the needs of families come first. I'm honored to stand shoulder to shoulder with her in this fight."
Elizabeth Warren and Christy Smith together in Congress could accomplish so much for our working families -- from better quality education to fairer wages and so much more, they will get to work in Washington for us.

**[So, if you can, please chip in $5 or whatever you can to Christy's campaign today! We've got less than 3 weeks to win our special election.](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb71/29776869/a26df54/569f558c/599992031/VEsP/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA0MjJfV2FycmVuZW5kby1zMyJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2004_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200422_Warrenendo-s3")**

Thanks so much for supporting our campaign.

\-- Team Christy
[DONATE](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb71/29776869/a26df54/569f558c/599992031/VEsHBQ/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA0MjJfV2FycmVuZW5kby1zMyJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2004_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200422_Warrenendo-s3")

clean_body: | []() | | Peter -- We're so honored to announce that Senator Elizabeth Warren just endorsed Christy! | "" "" If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: "" | "" ---|--- "" | "" "" | "" Here's what Senator Warren had to say: "I am proud to endorse Christy Smith because whether it was serving on the local PTA, school board, or in the state house, Christy has always stepped up. By swearing to never take a dime from a Corporate PAC or D.C. lobbyist, I know she will fight for her constituents, and her constituents alone. Now more than ever, we need fighters like Christy in Congress working to lower the cost of prescription drugs, make healthcare more affordable, provide American workers access to paid sick leave, and ensure the needs of families come first. I'm honored to stand shoulder to shoulder with her in this fight." Elizabeth Warren and Christy Smith together in Congress could accomplish so much for our working families -- from better quality education to fairer wages and so much more, they will get to work in Washington for us. "" Thanks so much for supporting our campaign. \-- Team Christy "" The number one priority during this time is to make sure everyone helps mitigate the spread of COVID-19 in California and across the country. Our campaign is doing our part by canceling all in-person events, moving to a digital operation, and supporting local efforts to help those in need. Emails like this are a critical part of our ability to run a strong campaign that can win. | | Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress. ---|--- |

name: WHO Funding Alert
subject: America trusts its scientists
disclaimer_text: Paid for by 314 Action Fund, 314action
body:
| Team,

In the midst of the most serious pandemic to hit the world in a century, Trump has tried to slash... funding for the World Health Organization (WHO). **Why?**

The WHO warned the USA about COVID-19 in December. While they warned us, Trump played golf, tweeted, and ignored the problem until it was too late.

**That is why we need your help. We are fighting back against Trump's attempts to gut WHO funding and censor scientists, but we can't do it alone.**

[Can you click here and add your name to demand that Trump not cut funding for the World Health Organization?](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb4c03/4bd7760e/5a931c51/77af4a41/3374447503/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/s/trump-who-funding?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=1+-+Can+you+click+here+and+add+your+name+to+&utm_campaign=314_EM_PT_200422_1MC_none_STD_2_trustscience&source=314_EM_PT_200422_1MC_none_STD_2_trustscience&refcode=314_EM_PT_200422_1MC_none_STD_2_trustscience")

name: Joe Kennedy III
subject: This Earth Day, let's recommit to trusting the scientific community that works so hard to lead us down the right path.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kennedy for Massachusetts
body:
| [](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/363901ef/55b66746/204bd83b/80e6a19/640490936/VEsH/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "http://www.kennedyforma.com/")
---

| | This Earth Day looks a little different than those of the past. But some things haven't changed:
1. **This Administration continues to deny science and the advice of scientific experts, putting us all at risk.** We've seen it with his attempt to throw the Paris Climate Accords in the trash, with his ransacking of environmental regulations, and his attempts to bail out big oil. Nothing has been done by this administration or Congressional Republicans to save our planet from catastrophic warming. And now we've seen it as we've attempted to combat the greatest public health threat of this generation - COVID-19.
2. **In the U.S. Senate I will fight against this inaction and ineptitude and tackle the climate crisis with everything I've got - just like I have in the House.** From helping push the Green New Deal, to ensuring frontline communities all across Massachusetts are not taken advantage of by energy companies, to working tirelessly to provide cleaner air, safer drinking water, and right the wrongs of decades-long environmental racism. I am in this fight. It's my generation's future on the line, my kids' and grandkids' planet under siege.
3. **Our Environmental Justice for All legislation is more essential than ever.** I believe this is one massive failure of the past generation's climate efforts -- a blind eye to the disparate impact of climate and environmental threats on black and brown communities, immigrant communities, low-income communities, and indigenous communities. These frontline families have borne the brunt of the climate crisis. And now COVID-19 has made it clear how deeply connected the air we breathe and pollution we are exposed to is to our health, resilience - and survival. This is a fight I've led in the House and that I'll take to the Senate, where we need a leader.

**This Earth Day, let's recommit to trusting the scientific community who is determined to lead us down the right path -- and save our planet.** Let's take on the structural inequities of the climate crisis, fight for those ravaged by environmental injustice, and combat the disparities in adverse health effects, pollution exposure, and vulnerability to the threats of climate change that disproportionately affect frontline communities. And let's work together to pass the mission statement we need to tackle this crisis: the Green New Deal, a bill I was proud to co-sponsor on day one. And then to put meat on the bones of that resolution and pass the actual policies and legislation we need to meet those goals. I'm proud to be in this fight with you. I'm proud to be a part of the generation that will finally solve this crisis. And I'll be proud to be your champion in the U.S. Senate. Stay well. Talk soon. | **In the past month, we have raised tens of thousands of dollars for charity organizations supporting those on the frontlines. Today, if you are financially able at this moment, I'd be grateful if you pitched in to support the community of Chelsea, MA. This proud community is one of the hardest-hit cities in the country by COVID-19 and has suffered from the impact of environmental injustice for years:** [DONATE TO SUPPORT CHELSEA](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/363901ef/55b66746/204bd83b/80e6a1a/640490936/VEsE/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIzIn0%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kennedy-chelseacollab?refcode=2020-04-22-earth-day&recurring=0&amount=3")
---

---|---

PO Box 15, Boston, MA 02137.

[](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/363901ef/55b66746/204bd83b/80e6a24/640490936/VEsC/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://www.facebook.com/JoeKennedyIII")[](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/363901ef/55b66746/204bd83b/80e6a25/640490936/VEsD/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://twitter.com/joekennedy")[](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/363901ef/55b66746/204bd83b/80e6a26/640490936/VEsA/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://www.instagram.com/joekennedyiii/")

Email is an important way for Joe Kennedy to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. Too much email? [**Switch to our less email option here**](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/363901ef/55b66746/204bd83b/80e6a27/640490936/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://action.joekennedyforcongress.com/page/s/less-email?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com; [click here to change your email address](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/363901ef/55b66746/204bd83b/80e6a20/640490936/VEsO/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://www.kennedyforma.com/update-address/"). If you no longer want to hear from Joe Kennedy, [click here to get off all our lists instantly.](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/363901ef/55b66746/204bd83b/80e6a21/640490936/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "http://action.joekennedyforcongress.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") Questions or concerns? [**Contact us here**](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/363901ef/55b66746/204bd83b/80e6a22/640490936/VEsHBQ/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://www.kennedyforma.com/contact/"). |

name: Susan Collins
subject: Stop Speaker Pelosi from delaying funding
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Collins for Senator
body:
I wanted to make sure you heard the good news. The Senate just passed an additional $320 billion in funding for the small business loan program that I authored with Senator Marco Rubio -- bringing the total for the program to $670 billion.
To unsubscribe click [here](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=NDIzMzE5MzAS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc0MjQwNTQ0OQS2&mt=1&rt=0)
[](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=NDIzMzE5MzAS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc0MjQwNTQ0OQS2&mt=1&rt=0)[****](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=14&ms=NDIzMzE5MzAS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc0MjQwNTQ0OQS2&mt=1&rt=0)
Peter,
I wanted to make sure you heard the good news. The Senate just passed an additional $320 billion in funding for the small business loan program that I authored with Senator Marco Rubio -- bringing the total for the program to $670 billion.
I worked with my colleagues on both sides of the aisle to pass legislation to support the small employers and their workers across the country who have been devastated by this pandemic.
**The program continues to be a huge success.**
After days of bipartisan negotiations, the Senate passed additional funding that will help small businesses and their employees across Maine and our country survive and pay their employees.
_**The bad news is that the bill still needs approval by the House of Representatives. It is critical that Nancy Pelosi immediately bring the bill up for a vote!**_
Small business owners have already been forced to wait for this funding because of Chuck Schumer's partisan delay. We cannot allow Speaker Pelosi and her allies in the House delay it any further.
[**Sign our petition to call on Speaker Pelosi to pass funding for small businesses NOW.**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=NDIzMzE5MzAS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc0MjQwNTQ0OQS2&mt=1&rt=0)
[Sign the Petition](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=NDIzMzE5MzAS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc0MjQwNTQ0OQS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---
In Maine, $2.22 billion has been provided to 16,196 small businesses. These forgivable loans will help these businesses survive and give paychecks to their employees.
But there are so many more businesses across our state and our country that are in desperate need of help. We cannot allow this funding to be stalled for anymore partisan delays.
[**Sign our petition to call on Speaker Pelosi to pass funding for small businesses NOW.**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=18&ms=NDIzMzE5MzAS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc0MjQwNTQ0OQS2&mt=1&rt=0)
[Sign the Petition](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=NDIzMzE5MzAS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc0MjQwNTQ0OQS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---
All my best,
Susan Collins
[](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=NDIzMzE5MzAS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc0MjQwNTQ0OQS2&mt=1&rt=0)

Paid for by Collins for Senator
---
P.O. Box 1096 Bangor, ME 04402
Click [here](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/servlet/OneClickOptOutServlet?m=42331930&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc0MjQwNTQ0OQS2&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe from Collins for Senator.
[Privacy Policy](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=NDIzMzE5MzAS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc0MjQwNTQ0OQS2&mt=1&rt=0)

name: Greg Pence
subject: re: I will not forfeit my vote
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greg Pence for Congress |
body:
Nancy Pelosi's plan to push voting by proxy in Congress SHOULD NOT even be a consideration. [ ](http://links.gregpenceforcongress.com/u/click?_t=c56a42391aaa4fc29673628e10310dda&_m=b70983f1f627462c8746cf06fcfeddf7&_e=jxcPS5KptjGcpaUMJ5qZ0xcFWu4vDkIHJuwwQAG1GXstX6nPTGPc7fZwdVa_WF6PG9AeoQGbOX6KaRFxCUeSwVfQrEUeSBXUxvNInhXmQlpKmjIIwpWhGSMACzZF2_0VMkpRqZGkOo0a4wH6mBlJuvbnjqiy0eGwzwl4UKd2nSw4mZHP7Enw0yGxuphM6es-dSe8lINEz3HX2J2xCPQG2n1U42fwUFGrJ6uSMkDgQHFbBeKhwMYj5RY8VHnPUxKiW87jjmmw4_WyrvqyiqSLM97YvbnaS1S8P9X7-jerzTHlO4tkxxClFrm81TO5C6bqPqoTVZsCLqIaxbUtuYvHo_F3drOiBo8WJbaCWBjny-LhnbdiG5hhB04nTUsGWqtoIaxe4yQbVK9UHK2Z-tq5DgAQcWLZeNoJ7pKDIvVyiV8%3D) Friend,
The Coronavirus has certainly changed the way we do a lot of things, but it should not change the way we vote in Congress.
Nancy Pelosi's plan to push voting by proxy in Congress SHOULD NOT even be a consideration. [ **CHIP IN NOW: Say no to proxy voting in Congress** ](http://links.gregpenceforcongress.com/u/click?_t=c56a42391aaa4fc29673628e10310dda&_m=b70983f1f627462c8746cf06fcfeddf7&_e=jxcPS5KptjGcpaUMJ5qZ0xcFWu4vDkIHJuwwQAG1GXstX6nPTGPc7fZwdVa_WF6PG9AeoQGbOX6KaRFxCUeSwVfQrEUeSBXUxvNInhXmQlpKmjIIwpWhGSMACzZF2_0VMkpRqZGkOo0a4wH6mBlJuvbnjqiy0eGwzwl4UKd2nSw4mZHP7Enw0yGxuphM6es-dSe8lINEz3HX2J2xCPQG2sPba2sbgYSzVyLWat-kreP4YOzVns22vuPIihdvrkaWVs0Ji9_9arHzNYSFXMGy4piUZUOOKFX_RTYYADKgt3r9AyLP4hO4-_0pyd8PwTzfiBcf0IiZefTu4z-533pQGDWphidNY1fCq5gAriGsUBum0kP5js2hJqr34AutkJb7XmaRFzXlxLhbFk15z35Ztm72qDy_1Toj3E5ponx069Y%3D) From the beginning of our nation’s history, Representatives in the People's House have voted in person through national crises. We made it through the Civil War, both World Wars, and 9/11 without implementing proxy voting and we can certainly make it through the Coronavirus.
This is nothing but a power play from Nancy Pelosi and her Democrat colleagues who want to abuse this pandemic to consolidate power among Washington's elite and further away from the American people.
**That is why I'm standing strong against Nancy Pelosi's proxy voting scheme and I want you join me today by chipping in:[https://secure.winred.com/gregpence/action-1165889/](http://links.gregpenceforcongress.com/u/click?_t=c56a42391aaa4fc29673628e10310dda&_m=b70983f1f627462c8746cf06fcfeddf7&_e=jxcPS5KptjGcpaUMJ5qZ0xcFWu4vDkIHJuwwQAG1GXstX6nPTGPc7fZwdVa_WF6PG9AeoQGbOX6KaRFxCUeSwVfQrEUeSBXUxvNInhXmQlpKmjIIwpWhGSMACzZF2_0VMkpRqZGkOo0a4wH6mBlJuvbnjqiy0eGwzwl4UKd2nSw4mZHP7Enw0yGxuphM6es-dSe8lINEz3HX2J2xCPQG2k_TM6egcdyZYs4C_2JgbXHT3lZEsKjsrYvpcB4ZG4b4eV7WhI0OAPuji7gTdBn6OMyvhqsOiKhXgYenj_xa2DNme1Y_Ca8qcq9mAAjb_8AuJ4w9s4sRVutwOKPaOufGvhDLTu0aDws-KibHEbs3JMqGO3ueQ5cIe1BA2sm323QZTXjNufOk9UbVPsv7qte7wX44a7ajYdggdqbok_vrhiY%3D)**
Friend, I believe it is my solemn duty to represent my constituents and cast votes in the House on their behalf, not to pass my vote to someone else who may have never stepped foot in our district.

Friend, The Coronavirus has certainly changed the way we do a lot of things, but it should not change the way we vote in Congress. Nancy Pelosi's plan to push voting by proxy in Congress SHOULD NOT even be a consideration. From the beginning of our nation’s history, Representatives in the People's House have voted in person through national crises. We made it through the Civil War, both World Wars, and 9/11 without implementing proxy voting and we can certainly make it through the Coronavirus. This is nothing but a power play from Nancy Pelosi and her Democrat colleagues who want to abuse this pandemic to consolidate power among Washington's elite and further away from the American people. name: Warren Democrats
subject: Add your name if you agree: We need a Green New Deal and a Blue New Deal to save our planet
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren Democrats
body:
Today's Earth Day, and some politicians would celebrate by only releasing flowery press releases, or planting trees, or talking in vague platitudes about the environment -- even while denying climate | | | [](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285257de/45c30650/1f57519f7/66e91460/576949278/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
Today's Earth Day, and some politicians would celebrate by only releasing flowery press releases, or planting trees, or talking in vague platitudes about the environment -- even while denying climate change and catering to Big Oil.

But Elizabeth doesn't just talk the talk -- she walks the walk.

She knows that climate change is an existential crisis for our earth, and that we can only truly celebrate Earth Day by calling for solutions that are big enough to solve this crisis.

We already see its effects -- record floods, terrifying wildfires, devastating hurricanes -- in events that cost lives, cause billions of dollars in damage, and disproportionately hurt our most vulnerable communities.

That's why Elizabeth supports a Green New Deal to transform our economy and save our planet -- but she isn't stopping there. She also has a plan for a Blue New Deal to save our oceans and rebuild our blue economy. And she knows that environmental justice has to be at the center of any plan to fight climate change. Now _that 's_ something to celebrate on Earth Day.

**[Add your name if you agree: The best way to celebrate Earth Day is to fight for a Green New Deal and a Blue New Deal to defeat the climate crisis.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285257de/45c30650/1f57519f7/66e91463/576949278/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTVExOVBfU0dOX0VOVl9EXzIwMjAwNDIyX1YxUzNfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/s/ew-wd-earth-day?source=EMQ19P_SGN_ENV_D_20200422_V1S3_P&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")**

We need to act now to save our planet before it's too late.

But right now, Washington refuses to lift a finger without permission from the fossil fuel industry. That's dangerous and wrong. We need a government that makes different choices -- a government that will stop handing out enormous tax giveaways to big oil companies and stop refusing to invest in our children's and grandchildren's futures.

This is a crisis. We need bold, aggressive action. We need a Green New Deal -- and we need it now.

Elizabeth is proud to be an original cosponsor of Senator Ed Markey and Representative Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez's Green New Deal resolution, which commits the United States to a ten-year mobilization to achieve domestic net-zero emissions by 2030. It provides the framework for an ambitious effort to transform our economy and save our planet.

Like the challenges America has faced before, the climate crisis is also an opportunity: to create good, union, American jobs in clean and renewable energy, infrastructure, and manufacturing, and to directly confront the racial and economic inequality embedded in our fossil fuel economy.

That means investing in sustainable, resilient infrastructure to meet the energy demands of the 21st century. Setting aggressive sector-specific standards to rapidly decarbonize across every sector of our economy. Encouraging our farmers to adopt climate-friendly sustainable agriculture practices. Conserving our public lands and making them part of the climate solution. Crafting international economic policies that encourage countries around the world to reduce emissions. Creating solutions that are just and sustainable for all Americans.

To really bend the curve on climate, we'll need sustained big, structural change across a range of industries and sectors. That's why Elizabeth has woven Green New Deal policies throughout her plans, and that's why we need to use all the levers of government to defeat the climate crisis.

And she's woven environmental justice into her plans to fight climate change -- because we also need to fight the effects of discrimination and environmental racism. We must transition to a 100% clean energy economy without leaving any community or any worker behind.

Elizabeth has also called for a Blue New Deal -- alongside a Green New Deal -- because the world's oceans are in crisis. Our oceans are warming, many of the world's fish stocks are fully exploited or overfished, our coasts are flooding and eroding, and pollution from land is causing dead zones in our waterways and Great Lakes.

We need to protect our oceans and inland waterways -- including expanding offshore wind energy development, ending offshore drilling, expanding marine protected areas, restoring vulnerable marine ecosystems, investing in U.S. fisheries, fighting for U.S. fishermen, and standing up for American maritime workers.

**We can fight climate change while protecting our health and creating good, high-wage union jobs in the process. We must meet the urgency of the moment with bold action -- with a Green New Deal and a Blue New Deal to transform our economy and save our planet.

[But it's going to take a grassroots movement to beat the fossil fuel lobby and get this done. Add your name if Elizabeth can count you in.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285257de/45c30650/1f57519f7/66e91463/576949278/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTVExOVBfU0dOX0VOVl9EXzIwMjAwNDIyX1YxUzNfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/s/ew-wd-earth-day?source=EMQ19P_SGN_ENV_D_20200422_V1S3_P&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")**

Thanks, and Happy Earth Day,

Warren Democrats
